## Thesis


## Load Data

```{r}
library(readr)

SIMOA <- read_csv("SIMOA Report.csv")
#View(SIMOA)
```




## Eligibility

```{r}
#| label: Eligible Participants
######
# Participant Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria
# 1. Age ≥65 years (age_cat == 1, or age_cat == 0 with age >= 65)
# 2. Selected at least one of 14 specified BZRAs
# 3. Answered discontinuation outcome (freq_dich)
# 4. Canadian resident (prov_terr != 14)
######

library(dplyr)

# Ensure dplyr functions take priority (safety check)
select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate

# Original count
n_original <- nrow(SIMOA)

# After age filtering (age_cat == 1 means 65+)
SIMOA_age_filtered <- SIMOA %>%
  filter(age_cat == 1 | (age_cat == 0 & age >= 65))
n_after_age <- nrow(SIMOA_age_filtered)

# After c_sp filtering (selecting those who indicated at least one of 14 BZRAs)
SIMOA_c_sp_filtered <- SIMOA_age_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    bzra_selected = rowSums(across(starts_with("c_sp___"), ~ .x == 1), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(bzra_selected > 0) %>%
  select(-bzra_selected)
n_after_c_sp <- nrow(SIMOA_c_sp_filtered)

# After freq_dich filtering
SIMOA_scrn_filtered <- SIMOA_c_sp_filtered %>%
  filter(!is.na(freq_dich))
n_after_scrn <- nrow(SIMOA_scrn_filtered)

# Remove non-Canadian participants (prov_terr == 14)
n_before_prov <- n_after_scrn
SIMOA <- SIMOA_scrn_filtered %>%
  filter(prov_terr != 14)
n_after_prov <- nrow(SIMOA)

# Calculate how many were removed
n_removed_prov <- n_before_prov - n_after_prov

# Summary output
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("SAMPLE INCLUSION/EXCLUSION SUMMARY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("Original sample size:", n_original, "\n")
cat("After age filtering (≥65 years):", n_after_age, " (", round(n_after_age / n_original * 100, 1), "% retained)\n")
cat("After BZRA confirmation:", n_after_c_sp, " (", round(n_after_c_sp / n_after_age * 100, 1), "% retained)\n")
cat("After outcome availability:", n_after_scrn, " (", round(n_after_scrn / n_after_c_sp * 100, 1), "% retained)\n")
cat("After Canadian residency filter:", n_after_prov, " (", round(n_after_prov / n_after_scrn * 100, 1), "% retained)\n")
cat("Non-Canadian participants removed:", n_removed_prov, "\n\n")

# Participant flow (CONSORT-style)
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PARTICIPANT FLOW\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("Initial sample:                    ", n_original, "\n")
cat("  ↓ Excluded (age <65):            ", n_original - n_after_age, "\n")
cat("Eligible by age:                   ", n_after_age, "\n")
cat("  ↓ Excluded (no BZRA use):        ", n_after_age - n_after_c_sp, "\n")
cat("Confirmed BZRA users:              ", n_after_c_sp, "\n")
cat("  ↓ Excluded (missing outcome):    ", n_after_c_sp - n_after_scrn, "\n")
cat("With outcome data:                 ", n_after_scrn, "\n")
cat("  ↓ Excluded (non-Canadian):       ", n_removed_prov, "\n")
cat("FINAL ANALYTIC SAMPLE:             ", n_after_prov, "\n\n")

# Total exclusion rate
pct_excluded_total <- 100 * (1 - n_after_prov / n_original)
cat("Total exclusion rate:", round(pct_excluded_total, 1), "%\n\n")

if(pct_excluded_total > 50) {
  cat("⚠️  More than 50% of sample excluded - verify inclusion criteria\n\n")
}

# Save exclusion summary for manuscript
exclusion_summary <- data.frame(
  Step = c(
    "1. Initial sample",
    "2. Age ≥65 years",
    "3. BZRA use confirmed",
    "4. Outcome available",
    "5. Canadian resident",
    "FINAL SAMPLE"
  ),
  N = c(n_original, n_after_age, n_after_c_sp, n_after_scrn, n_after_prov, n_after_prov),
  N_Excluded = c(
    NA,
    n_original - n_after_age,
    n_after_age - n_after_c_sp,
    n_after_c_sp - n_after_scrn,
    n_removed_prov,
    NA
  ),
  Pct_Retained = c(
    100,
    round(100 * n_after_age / n_original, 1),
    round(100 * n_after_c_sp / n_original, 1),
    round(100 * n_after_scrn / n_original, 1),
    round(100 * n_after_prov / n_original, 1),
    round(100 * n_after_prov / n_original, 1)
  )
)

write.csv(exclusion_summary, "sample_exclusion_flowchart.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: sample_exclusion_flowchart.csv\n\n")

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("✓ Eligibility filtering complete\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
```


## Personality Missingness
```{r}
#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 4: COMPREHENSIVE MISSINGNESS DIAGNOSTICS
#==============================================================================
# Purpose: Test MAR vs MNAR assumptions for all personality scales
# Determines which variables to include in imputation
#==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MISSINGNESS PATTERN ANALYSIS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

library(naniar)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# A. Visualize missing data patterns
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART A: Visualizing missingness patterns\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

# Select personality scales
personality_items <- SIMOA %>%
  select(dbas1:dbas_16, reserved:imagination, surps1:surps23, ciss1:ciss21)

# Missingness heatmap
cat("Creating missingness heatmap...\n")
png("missingness_heatmap.png", width = 1400, height = 800, res = 120)
vis_miss(personality_items, cluster = TRUE)
dev.off()
cat("✓ Saved: missingness_heatmap.png\n\n")

# Summary statistics
cat("Missingness by scale:\n")
miss_summary <- data.frame(
  Scale = c("DBAS (16 items)", "BFI (10 items)", "SURPS (23 items)", "CISS (21 items)"),
  N_Missing = c(
    sum(is.na(SIMOA$dbas1)),
    sum(is.na(SIMOA$reserved)),
    sum(is.na(SIMOA$surps1)),
    sum(is.na(SIMOA$ciss1))
  ),
  Percent = c(
    round(100 * mean(is.na(SIMOA$dbas1)), 1),
    round(100 * mean(is.na(SIMOA$reserved)), 1),
    round(100 * mean(is.na(SIMOA$surps1)), 1),
    round(100 * mean(is.na(SIMOA$ciss1)), 1)
  )
)
print(miss_summary)
cat("\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# B. Create missingness indicators
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART B: Creating missingness indicators\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

SIMOA <- SIMOA %>%
  mutate(
    miss_DBAS = ifelse(is.na(dbas1), 1, 0),
    miss_BFI = ifelse(is.na(reserved), 1, 0),
    miss_SURPS = ifelse(is.na(surps1), 1, 0),
    miss_CISS = ifelse(is.na(ciss1), 1, 0),
    miss_ANY_personality = ifelse(miss_DBAS + miss_BFI + miss_SURPS + miss_CISS > 0, 1, 0),
    n_personality_missing = miss_DBAS + miss_BFI + miss_SURPS + miss_CISS
  )

cat("Patterns of missingness:\n")
print(table(SIMOA$n_personality_missing))
cat("\n")

cat("People missing at least one scale:", sum(SIMOA$miss_ANY_personality), "\n")
cat("People with complete personality data:", sum(SIMOA$miss_ANY_personality == 0), "\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# C. Test predictors of missingness (MAR assessment)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART C: Testing predictors of missingness (MAR assessment)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

cat("GOAL: If missingness is predicted by observed variables, MAR is plausible.\n\n")

# Define potential predictors (check which exist)
demographic_vars_all <- c(
  "age", "sex", "gender", "prov_terr",
  "education", "income", "employment", "driving_freq", "med_quant", 
  "osss_3_score", "phq2_score"
)

# Only keep variables that exist in dataset
demographic_vars <- demographic_vars_all[demographic_vars_all %in% names(SIMOA)]

cat("Available demographic predictors (", length(demographic_vars), "):\n")
cat(paste("  •", demographic_vars, collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")

# Function to test predictors
test_missingness_predictors <- function(miss_var, data, predictors) {
  
  # Remove predictors that don't exist
  available_preds <- predictors[predictors %in% names(data)]
  
  cat("  Testing with", length(available_preds), "predictors\n")
  
  # Formula
  formula_str <- paste(miss_var, "~", paste(available_preds, collapse = " + "))
  
  # Fit model
  model <- tryCatch({
    glm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data, family = binomial())
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ⚠️ Model failed:", e$message, "\n")
    cat("  → Trying simpler model (age + sex + education)...\n")
    
    simple_formula <- paste(miss_var, "~ age + sex + education")
    tryCatch({
      glm(as.formula(simple_formula), data = data, family = binomial())
    }, error = function(e2) {
      cat("  ⚠️ Even simple model failed. Skipping.\n")
      return(NULL)
    })
  })
  
  if(is.null(model)) return(list(model = NULL, results = NULL, significant = NULL))
  
  # Get results
  results <- broom::tidy(model) %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      OR = exp(estimate),
      CI_lower = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
      CI_upper = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
      sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "*", "")
    ) %>%
    arrange(p.value)
  
  # Significant predictors
  sig_preds <- results %>%
    filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
    pull(term)
  
  return(list(
    model = model,
    results = results,
    significant = sig_preds
  ))
}

# Test for each scale
cat("Testing predictors of DBAS missingness:\n")
miss_DBAS_test <- test_missingness_predictors("miss_DBAS", SIMOA, demographic_vars)
if(!is.null(miss_DBAS_test$results)) {
  print(miss_DBAS_test$results %>% 
          select(term, OR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p.value, sig) %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3))))
}
cat("\n")

cat("Testing predictors of BFI missingness:\n")
miss_BFI_test <- test_missingness_predictors("miss_BFI", SIMOA, demographic_vars)
if(!is.null(miss_BFI_test$results)) {
  print(miss_BFI_test$results %>% 
          select(term, OR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p.value, sig) %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3))))
}
cat("\n")

cat("Testing predictors of SURPS missingness:\n")
miss_SURPS_test <- test_missingness_predictors("miss_SURPS", SIMOA, demographic_vars)
if(!is.null(miss_SURPS_test$results)) {
  print(miss_SURPS_test$results %>% 
          select(term, OR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p.value, sig) %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3))))
}
cat("\n")

cat("Testing predictors of CISS missingness:\n")
miss_CISS_test <- test_missingness_predictors("miss_CISS", SIMOA, demographic_vars)
if(!is.null(miss_CISS_test$results)) {
  print(miss_CISS_test$results %>% 
          select(term, OR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p.value, sig) %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3))))
}
cat("\n")

# Compile significant predictors
all_sig_predictors <- unique(c(
  miss_DBAS_test$significant,
  miss_BFI_test$significant,
  miss_SURPS_test$significant,
  miss_CISS_test$significant
))

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("SIGNIFICANT PREDICTORS OF MISSINGNESS:\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

if(length(all_sig_predictors) > 0) {
  cat("Variables that predict missing personality data:\n")
  for(pred in all_sig_predictors) {
    cat("  •", pred, "\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
  cat("→ Missingness is related to observed variables\n")
  cat("→ MAR assumption is plausible (conditional on these predictors)\n")
  cat("→ Include these in imputation model\n\n")
  
  missingness_mechanism <- "MAR"
  
} else {
  cat("No significant predictors found.\n\n")
  cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
  cat("→ Either MCAR or MNAR\n")
  cat("→ Sensitivity analyses are critical\n\n")
  
  missingness_mechanism <- "MCAR_or_MNAR"
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# D. Visualize relationships between missingness and predictors
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART D: Visualizing missingness relationships\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

if(length(all_sig_predictors) > 0) {
  
  cat("Creating visualization of significant predictors...\n")
  
  # For each significant predictor, create comparison plot
  for(pred in all_sig_predictors[1:min(3, length(all_sig_predictors))]) {  # Limit to first 3
    
    plot_data <- SIMOA %>%
      select(miss_ANY_personality, all_of(pred)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(!!sym(pred))) %>%
      mutate(missing_group = ifelse(miss_ANY_personality == 1, 
                                     "Missing Personality", 
                                     "Complete Personality"))
    
    # Check if numeric or categorical
    if(is.numeric(plot_data[[pred]])) {
      
      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = missing_group, y = !!sym(pred), fill = missing_group)) +
        geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.8) +
        labs(
          title = paste("Missingness by", pred),
          x = "",
          y = pred
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(legend.position = "none") +
        scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
      
    } else {
      
      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = !!sym(pred), fill = missing_group)) +
        geom_bar(position = "fill") +
        labs(
          title = paste("Missingness by", pred),
          x = pred,
          y = "Proportion",
          fill = ""
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
      
    }
    
    filename <- paste0("missingness_by_", pred, ".png")
    ggsave(filename, p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    cat("  ✓ Saved:", filename, "\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n")
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# E. Little's MCAR test
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART E: Little's MCAR test\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

cat("Running Little's MCAR test on personality variables...\n")

# Select personality scale scores (not items)
personality_scores <- SIMOA %>%
  select(starts_with("DBAS_"), starts_with("BFI_"), 
         starts_with("SURPS_"), starts_with("CISS_"))

# Run test
mcar_test <- tryCatch({
  naniar::mcar_test(personality_scores)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("  ⚠️ MCAR test failed:", e$message, "\n")
  return(NULL)
})

if(!is.null(mcar_test)) {
  cat("\nLittle's MCAR test results:\n")
  print(mcar_test)
  cat("\n")
  
  if(mcar_test$p.value > 0.05) {
    cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
    cat("→ p > .05: Cannot reject MCAR\n")
    cat("→ Data may be MCAR (completely random)\n")
    cat("→ Simple imputation methods may be sufficient\n\n")
    mcar_conclusion <- "MCAR plausible"
  } else {
    cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
    cat("→ p < .05: Reject MCAR\n")
    cat("→ Data are MAR or MNAR\n")
    cat("→ Multiple imputation recommended\n\n")
    mcar_conclusion <- "Not MCAR"
  }
} else {
  mcar_conclusion <- "Test failed"
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# F. Outcome relationship with missingness
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART F: Relationship between missingness and outcome\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

outcome_var <- "freq_dich"
# Note: freq_dich coding: 0,1 = discontinuers; 2 = continuers

if(outcome_var %in% names(SIMOA)) {
  
  cat("Testing if discontinuation predicts personality missingness:\n\n")
  
  # Cross-tabulation
  miss_by_outcome <- table(
    SIMOA[[outcome_var]], 
    SIMOA$miss_ANY_personality,
    useNA = "ifany"
  )
  
  cat("Missingness by discontinuation status:\n")
  print(addmargins(miss_by_outcome))
  cat("\n")
  
  # Chi-square test
  chisq_test <- chisq.test(miss_by_outcome)
  cat(sprintf("Chi-square test: χ²(1) = %.3f, p = %.4f\n\n", 
              chisq_test$statistic, chisq_test$p.value))
  
  if(chisq_test$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("⚠️ IMPORTANT: Outcome predicts missingness!\n")
    cat("→ This suggests MNAR (missing not at random)\n")
    cat("→ Results may be biased even with imputation\n")
    cat("→ Sensitivity analyses are CRITICAL\n\n")
    outcome_related <- TRUE
  } else {
    cat("✓ Outcome does not predict missingness\n")
    cat("→ MAR assumption more plausible\n\n")
    outcome_related <- FALSE
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Outcome variable not found. Skipping outcome-missingness analysis.\n\n")
  outcome_related <- NA
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# G. Summary and recommendations
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MISSINGNESS DIAGNOSTICS SUMMARY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# Compile findings
summary_findings <- data.frame(
  Test = c(
    "Predictors of missingness",
    "Little's MCAR test",
    "Outcome-missingness relationship"
  ),
  Result = c(
    ifelse(length(all_sig_predictors) > 0, 
           paste(length(all_sig_predictors), "significant predictors"), 
           "No significant predictors"),
    mcar_conclusion,
    ifelse(is.na(outcome_related), "Not tested",
           ifelse(outcome_related, "Significant (p<.05)", "Not significant"))
  ),
  Implication = c(
    ifelse(length(all_sig_predictors) > 0, "MAR plausible", "MCAR or MNAR"),
    ifelse(mcar_conclusion == "MCAR plausible", "MCAR", "MAR/MNAR"),
    ifelse(is.na(outcome_related), "Unknown",
           ifelse(outcome_related, "MNAR concern", "MAR plausible"))
  )
)

print(summary_findings)
cat("\n")

# Overall recommendation
cat("OVERALL ASSESSMENT:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

if(length(all_sig_predictors) > 0 && !outcome_related) {
  cat("✓ MAR ASSUMPTION APPEARS REASONABLE\n\n")
  cat("Evidence:\n")
  cat("  • Missingness predicted by observed variables\n")
  cat("  • Outcome does not predict missingness\n\n")
  cat("RECOMMENDATION:\n")
  cat("  1. Use multiple imputation (20+ imputations)\n")
  cat("  2. Include these predictors in imputation model:\n")
  for(pred in all_sig_predictors) {
    cat("     •", pred, "\n")
  }
  cat("  3. Conduct complete-case sensitivity analysis\n")
  cat("  4. Report both analyses in paper\n\n")
  
} else if(outcome_related) {
  cat("⚠️ MNAR CONCERN\n\n")
  cat("Evidence:\n")
  cat("  • Outcome predicts missingness\n")
  cat("  • Imputation may not recover true values\n\n")
  cat("RECOMMENDATION:\n")
  cat("  1. Use multiple imputation but interpret cautiously\n")
  cat("  2. Prioritize complete-case analysis\n")
  cat("  3. Conduct sensitivity analyses:\n")
  cat("     • Pattern-mixture models\n")
  cat("     • Tipping point analysis\n")
  cat("  4. Discuss MNAR as limitation\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("⚠️ UNCERTAIN MECHANISM\n\n")
  cat("Evidence:\n")
  cat("  • No clear predictors of missingness\n")
  cat("  • Could be MCAR or MNAR\n\n")
  cat("RECOMMENDATION:\n")
  cat("  1. Use multiple imputation conservatively\n")
  cat("  2. Emphasize complete-case analysis\n")
  cat("  3. Extensive sensitivity analyses\n")
  cat("  4. Acknowledge uncertainty in limitations\n\n")
}

# Save results
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("SAVING RESULTS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

missingness_results <- list(
  summary_statistics = miss_summary,
  significant_predictors = all_sig_predictors,
  DBAS_test = miss_DBAS_test,
  BFI_test = miss_BFI_test,
  SURPS_test = miss_SURPS_test,
  CISS_test = miss_CISS_test,
  mcar_test = mcar_test,
  mcar_conclusion = mcar_conclusion,
  outcome_related = outcome_related,
  overall_assessment = summary_findings,
  mechanism = missingness_mechanism
)

saveRDS(missingness_results, "missingness_diagnostics_results.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: missingness_diagnostics_results.rds\n")

write.csv(miss_summary, "missingness_summary_by_scale.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: missingness_summary_by_scale.csv\n")

write.csv(summary_findings, "missingness_assessment_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: missingness_assessment_summary.csv\n\n")

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MISSINGNESS DIAGNOSTICS COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
```


## Variable Coalescing, Preparation, Selection
```{r}
# ── PRE-FLIGHT CHECK: confirm v2 withdrawal data survived into Chunk 5+6 ──────
cat("PRE-FLIGHT: v2 withdrawal variable check\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

stoppers_mask_check <- !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich %in% c(0, 1)
cat(sprintf("N stoppers in SIMOA at chunk start: %d\n", sum(stoppers_mask_check)))

for (i in 1:4) {  # symptoms only
  v <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp_2___", i)
  if (v %in% names(SIMOA)) {
    n_checked <- sum(SIMOA[[v]][stoppers_mask_check] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %-28s: %d stoppers checked = 1\n", v, n_checked))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-28s: NOT FOUND ⛔\n", v))
  }
}
cat("\n")


#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 5+6: VARIABLE COALESCING, PREPARATION & SELECTION
#==============================================================================
# Purpose:
#   A. Coalesce base + v2 variables (survey branching: freq_dich=2 saw base,
#      freq_dich=0/1 saw v2)
#   B. Create withdrawal combined variable (imputed directly as unordered
#      factor with 3 levels)
#   C. Compute BZRA dose equivalents (NA for known users with missing
#      dose/freq; 0 for non-users of a given drug)
#   D. Recode fall2 (NA→0), sleep aids (NA→0), c_lengthofuse, alc_use
#   E. Health condition counts
#   F. Process gen_health
#   G. Personality reverse coding
#   H. Variable selection
#   I. Variable inventory
#   J. Save
#
# Outcome: freq_dich (0/1 = stoppers, 2 = continuers)
#
# WITHDRAWAL CODING (stop_wdl_exp_combined):
#   Collapsed to 3 unordered categories:
#     0 = No withdrawal symptoms
#     1 = Insomnia only
#     2 = Other withdrawal symptoms (anxiety only, other MH only,
#         physical only, or multiple symptom types)
#   Rationale: levels 2-5 from the original 6-level coding were too
#   sparse for reliable estimation (combined n ≈ 14 in full sample).
#   Stored as UNORDERED factor — categories are distinct nominal
#   types, not an ordered severity scale.
#   wdl_symptom_count (0-4) retained as a continuous predictor
#   capturing symptom burden severity within the "other withdrawal"
#   category.
#
# BZRA DOSE VARIABLES:
#   bzra_daily_dose_eq  = daily diazepam-equivalent dose (mg/day)
#   bzra_weekly_dose_eq = weekly diazepam-equivalent dose (mg/week)
#   Named "dose_eq" rather than "diazepam_eq" to allow conversion to
#   any benzodiazepine equivalent using standard divisors.
#
# Composites deferred to Chunk 9 (post-imputation):
#   benefitsC    = mean(benefit_1, benefit_4, benefit_5, benefit_6)
#   side_effectsC = mean(side_effects_1:4)
#   adlsC        = mean(adls_1, adls_2)
#   dependenceC  = mean(dependence_1:3)
#   motivationC  = mean(motivation_1:3)
#   capabilityC  = mean(capability_1, 6-capability)
#   pharmacistC  = mean(desires_2, 6-inf_hcp_3)
#   prescriberC  = mean(desires_1, 6-inf_hcp_1)
#
# Dropped from previous version:
#   safety_1:4, stop_rate_dc, med_burden_1/2/3/4, desires_3,
#   benefit_dep, all 17 reasons variables + v2 versions
#==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 5+6: VARIABLE COALESCING, PREPARATION & SELECTION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# PART A: COALESCING BASE + V2 VARIABLES
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART A: COALESCING BASE + V2 VARIABLES\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("BACKGROUND:\n")
cat("  freq_dich = 2 (continuers): saw base versions (e.g., benefit_1)\n")
cat("  freq_dich = 0/1 (stoppers): saw v2 versions  (e.g., benefit_1_v2)\n")
cat("  Withdrawal uses a different naming pattern AND a different fix:\n")
cat("    Continuers: stop_wdl_exp___0 to stop_wdl_exp___4\n")
cat("    Stoppers:   stop_wdl_exp_2___0 to stop_wdl_exp_2___4\n")
cat("  REDCap exports uncompleted checkboxes as 0 (not NA), so coalesce()\n")
cat("  cannot be used for withdrawal — direct overwrite is applied instead.\n\n")

# Helper: coalesce one pair and report
coalesce_pair <- function(data, base_var, v2_var) {
  has_base <- base_var %in% names(data)
  has_v2   <- v2_var   %in% names(data)

  if (has_base && has_v2) {
    n_base <- sum(!is.na(data[[base_var]]) &  is.na(data[[v2_var]]))
    n_v2   <- sum( is.na(data[[base_var]]) & !is.na(data[[v2_var]]))
    n_both <- sum(!is.na(data[[base_var]]) & !is.na(data[[v2_var]]))
    data[[base_var]] <- dplyr::coalesce(data[[base_var]], data[[v2_var]])
    data[[v2_var]]   <- NULL
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %-20s + %-25s → %-20s [base=%d, v2=%d, conflict=%d]\n",
                base_var, v2_var, base_var, n_base, n_v2, n_both))
  } else if (!has_base && has_v2) {
    data[[base_var]] <- data[[v2_var]]
    data[[v2_var]]   <- NULL
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ Renamed %-25s → %s\n", v2_var, base_var))
  } else if (has_base && !has_v2) {
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %-20s (no v2 found — keeping as-is)\n", base_var))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Neither %s nor %s found\n", base_var, v2_var))
  }
  return(data)
}

# Helper: coalesce a named group
coalesce_group <- function(data, base_vars, v2_vars, group_name) {
  cat(sprintf("%s:\n", group_name))
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  for (i in seq_along(base_vars)) {
    data <- coalesce_pair(data, base_vars[i], v2_vars[i])
  }
  cat("\n")
  return(data)
}

# ── A1. Benefits ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = c("benefit_1", "benefit_4", "benefit_5", "benefit_6"),
  v2_vars    = c("benefit_1_v2", "benefit_4_v2", "benefit_5_v2", "benefit_6_v2"),
  group_name = "Benefits (BMQ Necessity items)"
)

# ── A2. Side Effects ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = paste0("side_effects_", 1:4),
  v2_vars    = paste0("side_effects_", 1:4, "_v2"),
  group_name = "Side Effects"
)

# ── A3. ADLs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = paste0("adls_", 1:2),
  v2_vars    = paste0("adls_", 1:2, "_v2"),
  group_name = "ADL Impact"
)

# ── A4. Dependence ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = paste0("dependence_", 1:3),
  v2_vars    = paste0("dependence_", 1:3, "_v2"),
  group_name = "Dependence"
)

# ── A5. Motivation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = paste0("motivation_", 1:3),
  v2_vars    = paste0("motivation_", 1:3, "_v2"),
  group_name = "Motivation (COM-B)"
)

# ── A6. Capability ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = c("capability_1", "capability"),
  v2_vars    = c("capability_1_v2", "capability_v2"),
  group_name = "Capability (COM-B)"
)

# ── A7. Desires ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = c("desires_1", "desires_2"),
  v2_vars    = c("desires_1_v2", "desires_2_v2"),
  group_name = "Desires (COM-B)"
)

# ── A8. HCP Influence ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SIMOA <- coalesce_group(
  SIMOA,
  base_vars  = c("inf_hcp_1", "inf_hcp_3"),
  v2_vars    = c("inf_hcp_1_v2", "inf_hcp_3_v2"),
  group_name = "HCP Influence (components for prescriberC and pharmacistC)"
)

# ── A9. Withdrawal Checkboxes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# CONFIRMED from REDCap field definitions:
#
#   stop_wdl_exp     → shown to CONTINUERS only (freq_dich = 2)
#   stop_wdl_exp_2   → shown to STOPPERS only   (freq_dich = 0 or 1)
#
# Both versions have identical item structure:
#   ___1 = Insomnia
#   ___2 = Anxiety
#   ___3 = Other MH effects
#   ___4 = Physical effects
#   ___0 = No withdrawal effects  ← @NONEOFTHEABOVE confirmed for BOTH versions
#
# WHY COALESCE FAILS HERE:
#   REDCap exports uncompleted checkbox fields as 0, not NA.
#   Stoppers' base stop_wdl_exp___N columns are all 0 (question not shown
#   to them), so coalesce(0, real_value) = 0 — the pre-filled zeros block
#   the real v2 data from being pulled through.
#
# FIX: Direct overwrite
#   For stoppers  (freq_dich 0/1): overwrite base with v2 value.
#   For continuers (freq_dich 2):  keep base value unchanged.
#   ___0 == 1 is reliable as a "none" signal for ALL participants,
#   as @NONEOFTHEABOVE is confirmed present in both question versions.
#
# ── PRE-OVERWRITE DIAGNOSTIC ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("Withdrawal Checkboxes (DIRECT OVERWRITE — not coalesce):\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Continuers (freq_dich=2) : stop_wdl_exp___0   to stop_wdl_exp___4\n")
cat("  Stoppers   (freq_dich=0/1): stop_wdl_exp_2___0 to stop_wdl_exp_2___4\n\n")

stoppers_mask    <- !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich %in% c(0, 1)
continuers_mask  <- !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich == 2
n_stoppers_total <- sum(stoppers_mask)

cat(sprintf("  Stoppers   (freq_dich 0 or 1): n = %d\n", n_stoppers_total))
cat(sprintf("  Continuers (freq_dich 2):       n = %d\n\n", sum(continuers_mask)))

cat("  PRE-OVERWRITE — raw variable contents:\n")
cat("  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

for (i in 0:4) {
  base_var <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp___",   i)
  v2_var   <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp_2___", i)

  for (var in c(base_var, v2_var)) {
    if (var %in% names(SIMOA)) {
      n_stop_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA[[var]][stoppers_mask]))
      n_stop_checked <- sum(SIMOA[[var]][stoppers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
      n_cont_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA[[var]][continuers_mask]))
      n_cont_checked <- sum(SIMOA[[var]][continuers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
      cat(sprintf("  %-28s | stoppers: %d non-miss, %d checked | continuers: %d non-miss, %d checked\n",
                  var, n_stop_nonmiss, n_stop_checked, n_cont_nonmiss, n_cont_checked))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("  %-28s | NOT FOUND\n", var))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# Verify v2 stopper symptom data is actually present before proceeding
v2_symptom_vars    <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp_2___", 1:4)
v2_stopper_data_ok <- any(sapply(v2_symptom_vars, function(v) {
  v %in% names(SIMOA) && sum(SIMOA[[v]][stoppers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
}))

if (!v2_stopper_data_ok) {
  cat("  ⛔ CRITICAL: No stoppers have checked any v2 symptom checkbox.\n")
  cat("     The overwrite will not recover real data. Withdrawal variable names in SIMOA:\n")
  wdl_found <- grep("wdl|stop_wdl", names(SIMOA), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  for (v in wdl_found) cat("    •", v, "\n")
  stop("Stopping — verify withdrawal variable names and REDCap export before proceeding.")
} else {
  cat("  ✓ Stopper v2 symptom data confirmed present (≥1 checked response found).\n\n")
}

# ── DIRECT OVERWRITE: v2 → base for stoppers ─────────────────────────────────
cat("  APPLYING DIRECT OVERWRITE for stoppers...\n")
for (i in 0:4) {
  base_var <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp___",   i)
  v2_var   <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp_2___", i)

  if (base_var %in% names(SIMOA) && v2_var %in% names(SIMOA)) {
    SIMOA[[base_var]] <- ifelse(stoppers_mask, SIMOA[[v2_var]], SIMOA[[base_var]])
    SIMOA[[v2_var]]   <- NULL

    n_checked_stop <- sum(SIMOA[[base_var]][stoppers_mask]   == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    n_checked_cont <- sum(SIMOA[[base_var]][continuers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %-28s | stoppers checked: %3d | continuers checked: %3d\n",
                base_var, n_checked_stop, n_checked_cont))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Missing: %s or %s\n", base_var, v2_var))
  }
}
cat("\n")

# ── POST-OVERWRITE DIAGNOSTIC ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("  POST-OVERWRITE — coalesced variable contents:\n")
cat("  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
for (i in 0:4) {
  var <- paste0("stop_wdl_exp___", i)
  if (var %in% names(SIMOA)) {
    n_stop_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA[[var]][stoppers_mask]))
    n_stop_checked <- sum(SIMOA[[var]][stoppers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    n_cont_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA[[var]][continuers_mask]))
    n_cont_checked <- sum(SIMOA[[var]][continuers_mask] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %-28s | stoppers: %d non-miss, %d checked | continuers: %d non-miss, %d checked\n",
                var, n_stop_nonmiss, n_stop_checked, n_cont_nonmiss, n_cont_checked))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-28s | MISSING after overwrite\n", var))
  }
}
cat("\n")

# ── Verify no unwanted v2 variables remain ────────────────────────────────────
remaining_v2 <- grep("_v2$|_2___[0-9]$", names(SIMOA), value = TRUE)
if (length(remaining_v2) == 0) {
  cat("✓ No v2 variables remaining in SIMOA\n\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ℹ️  %d v2-pattern variables still in SIMOA:\n", length(remaining_v2)))
  for (v in remaining_v2) cat("    •", v, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

# =============================================================================
# PART B: WITHDRAWAL COMBINED VARIABLE
# =============================================================================
#
# DESIGN NOTES:
#
#   After the direct overwrite in A9, stop_wdl_exp___N holds data for ALL
#   participants:
#     Continuers: their original responses to stop_wdl_exp
#     Stoppers:   their responses from stop_wdl_exp_2 (copied into base cols)
#
#   @NONEOFTHEABOVE=0 is confirmed for BOTH question versions, so ___0 == 1
#   is a reliable "none" signal for all participants.
#
#   COLLAPSED CODING (3 levels — unordered factor):
#     0 = No withdrawal symptoms
#     1 = Insomnia only
#     2 = Other withdrawal symptoms
#         (anxiety only, other MH only, physical only, or multiple types)
#
#   RATIONALE FOR COLLAPSING:
#     Original 6-level coding had extremely sparse cells:
#       Level 2 (Anxiety only):        n ≈ 8.6
#       Level 3 (Other MH only):       n ≈ 2.2
#       Level 4 (Physical only):       n ≈ 3.1
#       Level 5 (Multiple symptoms):   n ≈ 137.6
#     Levels 2, 3, and 4 combined: n ≈ 14. This caused near-complete
#     separation in logistic regression for levels 3 and 4. The collapsed
#     "Other withdrawal symptoms" category pools these rare types with
#     multiple-symptom presentations, which share the clinical feature of
#     involving withdrawal symptomatology beyond insomnia alone.
#
#   STORED AS UNORDERED FACTOR:
#     These are distinct nominal categories, not an ordered severity scale.
#     Downstream regression models will use dummy coding (0/1/2) rather
#     than polynomial contrasts.
#
#   wdl_symptom_count (0-4) is retained as a separate continuous predictor
#   capturing the number of symptom types, providing additional granularity
#   on burden severity within the "Other withdrawal" category.
#
#   TRUE NON-RESPONDERS:
#     A participant is a true non-responder if ALL five checkboxes are 0
#     AND ___0 is also 0 — i.e., they neither endorsed any symptom nor
#     confirmed "no withdrawal". These are left as NA for imputation.
#
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART B: CREATING WITHDRAWAL COMBINED VARIABLE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("CODING:\n")
cat("  0 = No withdrawal symptoms\n")
cat("  1 = Insomnia only\n")
cat("  2 = Other withdrawal symptoms (anxiety only, other MH only,\n")
cat("      physical only, or multiple symptom types)\n")
cat("  Stored as UNORDERED factor (nominal categories, not ordered severity)\n\n")

wdl_none     <- "stop_wdl_exp___0"
wdl_insomnia <- "stop_wdl_exp___1"
wdl_anxiety  <- "stop_wdl_exp___2"
wdl_mh_other <- "stop_wdl_exp___3"
wdl_physical <- "stop_wdl_exp___4"
wdl_symptoms <- c(wdl_insomnia, wdl_anxiety, wdl_mh_other, wdl_physical)
wdl_all_five <- c(wdl_none, wdl_symptoms)

if (all(wdl_all_five %in% names(SIMOA))) {

  # ── Step 1: Identify true non-responders ──────────────────────────────────
  wdl_matrix      <- as.matrix(SIMOA[, wdl_all_five])
  all_zero        <- rowSums(wdl_matrix == 0, na.rm = TRUE) == 5
  any_checked     <- rowSums(wdl_matrix == 1, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
  responded       <- any_checked | (!all_zero)

  cat("RESPONSE PATTERN (after overwrite):\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat(sprintf("  Responded (≥1 box checked):   %d\n", sum(responded)))
  cat(sprintf("  True non-responders (all 0):  %d  (→ NA for imputation)\n\n",
              sum(!responded)))

  cat("RESPONSE RATE BY GROUP:\n")
  for (grp in c(0, 1, 2)) {
    grp_mask  <- !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich == grp
    grp_label <- c("Stopped completely (0)", "Rare use (1)", "Continuers (2)")[grp + 1]
    n_grp     <- sum(grp_mask)
    n_ans     <- sum(responded[grp_mask])
    cat(sprintf("  %-25s: N=%d | responded=%d (%.1f%%)\n",
                grp_label, n_grp, n_ans, 100 * n_ans / max(n_grp, 1)))
  }
  cat("\n")

  # ── Step 2: Compute wdl_symptom_count ────────────────────────────────────
  SIMOA$wdl_symptom_count <- ifelse(
    responded,
    rowSums(SIMOA[, wdl_symptoms] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    NA_integer_
  )

  # ── Step 3: Derive stop_wdl_exp_combined (3-level, unordered) ────────────
  #
  #  Coding:
  #    NA → true non-responder
  #    0  → no withdrawal (___0 == 1, or no symptoms checked)
  #    1  → insomnia only
  #    2  → other withdrawal symptoms:
  #           anxiety only (original level 2)
  #           other MH only (original level 3)
  #           physical only (original level 4)
  #           multiple symptom types (original level 5, count ≥ 2)
  #
  #  Stored as UNORDERED factor so downstream models use dummy coding,
  #  not polynomial contrasts.

  SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined <- dplyr::case_when(
    !responded                                                  ~ NA_integer_,
    SIMOA[[wdl_none]] == 1                                     ~ 0L,
    SIMOA$wdl_symptom_count == 0                               ~ 0L,
    SIMOA$wdl_symptom_count == 1 & SIMOA[[wdl_insomnia]] == 1 ~ 1L,
    TRUE                                                        ~ 2L   # all other symptom patterns
  )

  # Store as UNORDERED factor
  SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined <- factor(
    SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined,
    levels  = c(0L, 1L, 2L),
    labels  = c("No withdrawal", "Insomnia only", "Other withdrawal symptoms"),
    ordered = FALSE
  )

  cat("✓ wdl_symptom_count created (0-4 for responders, NA for non-responders)\n")
  cat("✓ stop_wdl_exp_combined created (0/1/2 unordered factor, NA for non-responders)\n\n")

  # ── Distribution ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  wdl_dist  <- table(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined, useNA = "ifany")
  n_valid   <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined))
  n_na_comb <- sum(is.na(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined))

  cat("DISTRIBUTION (overall):\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  for (lv in levels(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined)) {
    if (lv %in% names(wdl_dist)) {
      n   <- wdl_dist[lv]
      pct <- round(100 * n / n_valid, 1)
      cat(sprintf("  %-35s: n=%4d (%5.1f%% of responders)\n", lv, n, pct))
    }
  }
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: n=%4d\n\n", "Missing (→ imputation)", n_na_comb))

  # ── Sanity checks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  n_none_flag  <- sum(SIMOA[[wdl_none]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_combined_0 <- sum(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined == "No withdrawal", na.rm = TRUE)
  n_any_symptom <- sum(SIMOA$wdl_symptom_count > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

  cat("SANITY CHECKS:\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat(sprintf("  ___0 checkbox = 1 ('none' flag):                   %d\n", n_none_flag))
  cat(sprintf("  stop_wdl_exp_combined = 'No withdrawal':           %d\n", n_combined_0))
  cat(sprintf("  wdl_symptom_count > 0 (any symptom):               %d\n", n_any_symptom))
  cat(sprintf("  stop_wdl_exp_combined = NA (non-responder):        %d\n\n", n_na_comb))
  cat("  Expected: ~16 stoppers with no withdrawal symptoms.\n")
  cat("  If stoppers still all show 0, the overwrite in A9 did not work.\n\n")

  # ── Distribution by group ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat("DISTRIBUTION BY FREQ_DICH GROUP:\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  for (grp in c(0, 1, 2)) {
    grp_mask  <- !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich == grp
    grp_label <- c("Stopped completely (0)", "Rare use (1)", "Continuers (2)")[grp + 1]
    grp_dist  <- table(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined[grp_mask], useNA = "ifany")
    n_grp     <- sum(grp_mask)
    n_na_grp  <- sum(is.na(SIMOA$stop_wdl_exp_combined[grp_mask]))
    cat(sprintf("\n  %s (N=%d, %d missing):\n", grp_label, n_grp, n_na_grp))
    for (lv in c("No withdrawal", "Insomnia only", "Other withdrawal symptoms")) {
      if (lv %in% names(grp_dist) && grp_dist[lv] > 0)
        cat(sprintf("    %-35s: n=%d\n", lv, grp_dist[lv]))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")

  # ── Symptom rates among stoppers ─────────────────────────────────────────
  cat("SYMPTOM RATES AMONG STOPPERS (freq_dich 0 or 1):\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  stopper_resp   <- stoppers_mask & responded
  n_stopper_resp <- sum(stopper_resp)
  cat(sprintf("  Stoppers who responded: %d\n", n_stopper_resp))
  symptom_labels <- c("Insomnia", "Anxiety", "Other MH", "Physical")
  for (j in seq_along(wdl_symptoms)) {
    n_endorsed <- sum(SIMOA[[wdl_symptoms[j]]][stopper_resp] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %-12s endorsed: %d (%.1f%% of stopper responders)\n",
                symptom_labels[j], n_endorsed,
                100 * n_endorsed / max(n_stopper_resp, 1)))
  }
  cat("\n")

} else {
  missing_wdl <- wdl_all_five[!wdl_all_five %in% names(SIMOA)]
  cat("⚠️  Cannot create combined variable. Missing coalesced columns:\n")
  for (v in missing_wdl) cat("  •", v, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

# =============================================================================
# PART C: BZRA DOSE EQUIVALENT CALCULATIONS
# =============================================================================
# Variable names:
#   bzra_weekly_dose_eq = weekly dose equivalent (mg/week)
#   bzra_daily_dose_eq  = daily dose equivalent  (mg/day) = weekly / 7
#
# Named "dose_eq" (not "diazepam_eq") to be medication-agnostic — the
# same divisors can be used to convert to any benzodiazepine equivalent
# by applying the appropriate reference drug divisor.
#
# Formulas:
#   Weekly dose eq = SUM across drugs: (days/week × daily_dose_mg) / divisor
#   Daily dose eq  = weekly / 7
#
# Divisors (mg relative to 5mg diazepam):
#   Zopiclone=7.5, Lorazepam=1, Clonazepam=0.375, Alprazolam=0.5,
#   Bromazepam=3, Chlordiazepoxide=25, Diazepam=5, Flurazepam=15,
#   Nitrazepam=2.5, Oxazepam=15, Temazepam=10, Triazolam=0.25,
#   Zolpidem=10, Eszopiclone=3
#
# Missing data approach:
#   • 0  = person does NOT use this drug (c_sp checkbox not checked)
#   • NA = person DOES use this drug but freq or dose is missing
#          → treated as missing data for imputation
#   • If any drug contribution is NA, total dose eq is set to NA
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART C: BZRA DOSE EQUIVALENT CALCULATIONS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

recode_freq <- function(x) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    x == 1 ~ 7,   x == 2 ~ 6,   x == 3 ~ 5,   x == 4 ~ 4,
    x == 5 ~ 3,   x == 6 ~ 2,   x == 7 ~ 1,   x == 8 ~ 0.5,
    TRUE   ~ NA_real_
  )
}

extract_dose <- function(data, dose_cols, other_col) {
  dose <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  for (col in names(dose_cols)) {
    if (col %in% names(data)) {
      dose <- dplyr::if_else(
        !is.na(data[[col]]) & data[[col]] == 1 & is.na(dose),
        dose_cols[[col]], dose
      )
    }
  }
  if (!is.null(other_col) && other_col %in% names(data)) {
    other_vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(data[[other_col]]))
    dose <- dplyr::if_else(!is.na(other_vals), other_vals, dose)
  }
  return(dose)
}

compute_drug_weekly_eq <- function(data, drug) {
  is_curr <- !is.na(data$freq_dich) & data$freq_dich == 2
  is_past <- !is.na(data$freq_dich) & (data$freq_dich == 0 | data$freq_dich == 1)

  if (!is.null(drug$sp_col) && drug$sp_col %in% names(data)) {
    uses_drug <- !is.na(data[[drug$sp_col]]) & data[[drug$sp_col]] == 1
  } else {
    uses_drug <- rep(TRUE, nrow(data))
  }

  freq_c <- if (drug$freq_curr %in% names(data)) recode_freq(data[[drug$freq_curr]]) else rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  dose_c <- extract_dose(data, drug$dose_curr, drug$other_curr)
  freq_p <- if (drug$freq_past %in% names(data)) recode_freq(data[[drug$freq_past]]) else rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  dose_p <- extract_dose(data, drug$dose_past, drug$other_past)

  dplyr::case_when(
    is_curr & uses_drug & !is.na(freq_c) & !is.na(dose_c) ~ (freq_c * dose_c) / drug$divisor,
    is_past & uses_drug & !is.na(freq_p) & !is.na(dose_p) ~ (freq_p * dose_p) / drug$divisor,
    uses_drug & (is_curr | is_past)                        ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE                                                   ~ 0
  )
}

    dose_curr  = list(alp_24dose_curr___1=0.25, alp_24dose_curr___2=0.5,

cat("Computing per-drug weekly dose equivalents...\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

weekly_eq_matrix <- purrr::map_dfc(
  drug_definitions,
  ~ compute_drug_weekly_eq(SIMOA, .x)
)

SIMOA <- SIMOA %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bzra_weekly_dose_eq = rowSums(weekly_eq_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
    bzra_weekly_dose_eq = dplyr::if_else(
      apply(weekly_eq_matrix, 1, anyNA),
      NA_real_,
      bzra_weekly_dose_eq
    ),
    bzra_daily_dose_eq = bzra_weekly_dose_eq / 7
  )

cat("✓ bzra_weekly_dose_eq created (mg/week)\n")
cat("✓ bzra_daily_dose_eq  created (mg/day = weekly / 7)\n")
cat("  (NA = confirmed user with missing dose/freq — will be imputed)\n\n")

cat("SUMMARY:\n")
cat(sprintf("  N with daily eq > 0:      %d\n",   sum(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq > 0,  na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  N with daily eq = 0:      %d\n",   sum(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq == 0, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  N with daily eq = NA:     %d\n",   sum(is.na(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq))))
cat(sprintf("  Mean   (mg, non-missing): %.2f\n", mean(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq,   na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Median (mg, non-missing): %.2f\n", median(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Max    (mg):              %.2f\n\n", max(SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq,   na.rm = TRUE)))

cat("PER-DRUG CONTRIBUTION (n with non-zero eq):\n")
for (i in seq_along(names(drug_definitions))) {
  drug_name <- names(drug_definitions)[i]
  n_nonzero <- sum(weekly_eq_matrix[[i]] > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (n_nonzero > 0) {
    mean_eq <- mean(weekly_eq_matrix[[i]][weekly_eq_matrix[[i]] > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("  %-20s: n=%3d, mean weekly eq = %.2f mg\n", drug_name, n_nonzero, mean_eq))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-20s: no users\n", drug_name))
  }
}

cat("\nBY FREQ_DICH GROUP:\n")
group_labels <- c("0" = "Stoppers - none (0) ",
                  "1" = "Stoppers - rare (1) ",
                  "2" = "Continuers      (2) ")
for (grp in c(0, 1, 2)) {
  grp_data <- SIMOA$bzra_daily_dose_eq[
    !is.na(SIMOA$freq_dich) & SIMOA$freq_dich == grp]
  cat(sprintf("  %s: n=%d, mean=%.2f, median=%.2f, max=%.2f\n",
              group_labels[as.character(grp)], length(grp_data),
              mean(grp_data, na.rm = TRUE), median(grp_data, na.rm = TRUE),
              max(grp_data, na.rm = TRUE)))
}
cat("\n  ⚠️  Sanity checks:\n")
cat("  • All three groups used BZRAs — all should have mean > 0\n")
cat("  • freq_dich=0 (stopped completely): expect non-zero past dose\n")
cat("  • freq_dich=1 (rare use):           expect low non-zero dose\n")
cat("  • freq_dich=2 (continuers):         expect highest mean dose\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# PART D: RECODING
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART D: RECODING VARIABLES\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# ── D1. fall2: NA → 0 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("D1. fall2 (NA → 0 = not injured / no fall reported)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
if ("fall2" %in% names(SIMOA)) {
  n_na <- sum(is.na(SIMOA$fall2))
  SIMOA$fall2[is.na(SIMOA$fall2)] <- 0
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ %d NAs recoded to 0\n", n_na))
  cat("  Distribution after recoding:\n")
  fall2_dist   <- table(SIMOA$fall2)
  fall2_labels <- c("0 = Not injured / no fall", "1 = Minor injury",
                    "2 = Serious injury", "3 = Fall but no injury")
  for (i in seq_along(fall2_dist)) {
    lbl <- if (i <= length(fall2_labels)) fall2_labels[i] else paste0("Level ", names(fall2_dist)[i])
    cat(sprintf("    %-30s: n=%d\n", lbl, fall2_dist[i]))
  }
} else {
  cat("  ⚠️  fall2 not found in dataset\n")
}
cat("\n")

# ── D2. Sleep aids: NA → 0 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("D2. Sleep aids (NA → 0 = never uses)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
sleep_aids_vars <- c("alc_sleep", "can_sleep", "melatonin_use", "op_sleep")
for (var in sleep_aids_vars) {
  if (var %in% names(SIMOA)) {
    n_na <- sum(is.na(SIMOA[[var]]))
    SIMOA[[var]][is.na(SIMOA[[var]])] <- 0
    n_use <- sum(SIMOA[[var]] > 0)
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %-15s: %d NAs → 0 | n using = %d\n", var, n_na, n_use))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %-15s: not found\n", var))
  }
}
cat("\n")

# ── D3. c_lengthofuse: character → numeric, negative → 0 ─────────────────────
cat("\nD3. c_lengthofuse (character → numeric; negative values → 0)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
if ("c_lengthofuse" %in% names(SIMOA)) {
  n_before <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse))
  SIMOA$c_lengthofuse <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse))
  n_after  <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse))
  n_lost   <- n_before - n_after
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ Converted to numeric\n"))
  if (n_lost > 0)
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d values lost in conversion (non-numeric strings → NA)\n", n_lost))

  # Negative values → 0 (data entry error; person has some length of use
  # but the exact value is unknown — 0 is conservative and will be imputed)
  n_negative <- sum(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("  Negative values found: %d\n", n_negative))
  if (n_negative > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %d negative value(s) recoded to 0 (data entry error;\n", n_negative))
    cat("    patient clearly has some length of use — 0 is conservative\n")
    cat("    and will be handled by the imputation model)\n")
    SIMOA$c_lengthofuse[!is.na(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse) & SIMOA$c_lengthofuse < 0] <- 0
  } else {
    cat("  ✓ No negative values found\n")
  }

  cat(sprintf("  Mean (SD):  %.2f (%.2f) years\n",
              mean(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse,   na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  Range:      %.1f to %.1f years\n",
              min(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse, na.rm = TRUE),
              max(SIMOA$c_lengthofuse, na.rm = TRUE)))
} else {
  cat("  ⚠️  c_lengthofuse not found\n")
}
cat("\n")

# ── D4. Alcohol use: combine sex-specific variables → alc_use (0-4) ──────────
cat("\nD4. alc_use — combining sex-specific alcohol variables (0-4 ordinal)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  alc_use_wmn (sex=1): 0=Never, 1=<1/wk, 2=1-5/wk, 3=6-10/wk, 4=>10/wk\n")
cat("  alc_use_men (sex=2): 1=Never, 2=<1/wk, 3=1-7/wk, 4=8-14/wk, 5=>14/wk\n")
cat("  → men recoded: value - 1 (1→0, 2→1, 3→2, 4→3, 5→4)\n")
cat("  → sex-discordant values set to NA before combining\n")
cat("  NOTE: REDCap exports all checkboxes as 0 for participants who did\n")
cat("  not see a question, so both alc_use_wmn and alc_use_men may appear\n")
cat("  non-missing for all participants. Sex-discordant masking via\n")
cat("  if_else(sex == 1, ...) handles this correctly. The n_both check\n")
cat("  below uses !is.na() which may show non-zero even when values are\n")
cat("  REDCap-filled zeros — this is expected and not a data problem.\n\n")

if (all(c("alc_use_wmn", "alc_use_men", "sex") %in% names(SIMOA))) {

  SIMOA <- SIMOA %>%
    mutate(
      alc_use_wmn_clean = if_else(sex == 1, as.numeric(alc_use_wmn), NA_real_),
      alc_use_men_clean = if_else(sex == 2, as.numeric(alc_use_men), NA_real_),
      alc_use_men_r     = alc_use_men_clean - 1,
      alc_use           = dplyr::coalesce(alc_use_wmn_clean, alc_use_men_r)
    ) %>%
    select(-alc_use_wmn_clean, -alc_use_men_clean, -alc_use_men_r)

  n_both <- sum(!is.na(SIMOA$alc_use_wmn) & !is.na(SIMOA$alc_use_men), na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("  n with non-NA on both alc_use_wmn and alc_use_men: %d\n", n_both))
  cat("  (Non-zero is expected due to REDCap exporting all fields;\n")
  cat("   sex-discordant masking above ensures correct variable is used)\n")

  cat(sprintf("  ✓ alc_use created | N complete = %d | N missing = %d\n\n",
              sum(!is.na(SIMOA$alc_use)), sum(is.na(SIMOA$alc_use))))

  cat("  DISTRIBUTION (0=Never → 4=Very high):\n")
  alc_dist   <- table(SIMOA$alc_use, useNA = "ifany")
  alc_labels <- c("0 = Never", "1 = Low (<1/wk)", "2 = Moderate",
                  "3 = High", "4 = Very high")
  for (i in 0:4) {
    key <- as.character(i)
    if (key %in% names(alc_dist)) {
      n   <- alc_dist[key]
      pct <- round(100 * n / nrow(SIMOA), 1)
      cat(sprintf("    %-22s: n=%4d (%5.1f%%)\n", alc_labels[i + 1], n, pct))
    }
  }
  if ("NA" %in% names(alc_dist))
    cat(sprintf("    %-22s: n=%4d\n", "Missing", alc_dist["NA"]))

  cat("\n  BY SEX:\n")
  for (s in c(1, 2)) {
    sex_label <- if (s == 1) "Women (sex=1)" else "Men   (sex=2)"
    sub       <- SIMOA$alc_use[!is.na(SIMOA$sex) & SIMOA$sex == s]
    cat(sprintf("    %-15s: n=%d, mean=%.2f, median=%.1f\n",
                sex_label, sum(!is.na(sub)),
                mean(sub, na.rm = TRUE), median(sub, na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
} else {
  missing_alc <- c("alc_use_wmn", "alc_use_men", "sex")[
    !c("alc_use_wmn", "alc_use_men", "sex") %in% names(SIMOA)]
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Cannot create alc_use. Missing: %s\n",
              paste(missing_alc, collapse = ", ")))
}
cat("\n")

# =============================================================================
# PART E: HEALTH CONDITION COUNTS
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART E: HEALTH CONDITION COUNTS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

make_count <- function(data, pattern, none_col, var_name) {
  all_cols  <- grep(pattern, names(data), value = TRUE)
  item_cols <- all_cols[all_cols != none_col]
  if (length(item_cols) > 0) {
    data[[var_name]] <- rowSums(data[, item_cols] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("✓ %-25s: %d checkboxes | mean=%.2f | range=[%d-%d]\n",
                var_name, length(item_cols),
                mean(data[[var_name]]),
                min(data[[var_name]]),
                max(data[[var_name]])))
  } else {
    data[[var_name]] <- 0L
    cat(sprintf("⚠️  %-25s: no checkboxes found — set to 0\n", var_name))
  }
  return(data)
}

SIMOA <- make_count(SIMOA, "^phys_health_con___",  "phys_health_con___0",  "n_physical_conditions")
SIMOA <- make_count(SIMOA, "^ment_health_con___",  "ment_health_con___0",  "n_ment_conditions")
SIMOA <- make_count(SIMOA, "^sleep_health_con___", "sleep_health_con___0", "n_sleep_conditions")

SIMOA$n_health_conditions <- SIMOA$n_physical_conditions +
                              SIMOA$n_ment_conditions    +
                              SIMOA$n_sleep_conditions
cat(sprintf("✓ %-25s: total | mean=%.2f | range=[%d-%d]\n\n",
            "n_health_conditions",
            mean(SIMOA$n_health_conditions),
            min(SIMOA$n_health_conditions),
            max(SIMOA$n_health_conditions)))

condition_counts <- c("n_health_conditions", "n_physical_conditions",
                      "n_ment_conditions",   "n_sleep_conditions")

cat("\nSANITY CHECK — participants with zero conditions per category:\n")
for (cv in c("n_physical_conditions", "n_ment_conditions",
             "n_sleep_conditions", "n_health_conditions")) {
  n_zero <- sum(SIMOA[[cv]] == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("  %-25s: n with 0 = %d (%.1f%%)\n",
              cv, n_zero, 100 * n_zero / nrow(SIMOA)))
}
cat("\n  ℹ️  Note: n_physical_conditions excludes 'None' checkbox (phys_health_con___0)\n")
cat("  If zero counts are implausibly low, verify @NONEOFTHEABOVE checkbox logic\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# PART F: GEN_HEALTH
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART F: PROCESSING GEN_HEALTH\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

gh_levels <- 1:5
gh_labels <- c("Poor", "Fair", "Good", "Very good", "Excellent")

if ("gen_health" %in% names(SIMOA)) {
  if (!is.ordered(SIMOA$gen_health)) {
    SIMOA$gen_health <- factor(SIMOA$gen_health,
                                levels = gh_levels, labels = gh_labels,
                                ordered = TRUE)
  }
  cat("✓ gen_health: converted to ordered factor\n")
  print(table(SIMOA$gen_health, useNA = "ifany"))
  cat("\n")
} else if (any(grepl("^gen_health___", names(SIMOA)))) {
  gh_cols <- paste0("gen_health___", 1:5)
  gh_cols <- gh_cols[gh_cols %in% names(SIMOA)]
  SIMOA$gen_health <- apply(SIMOA[, gh_cols], 1, function(x) {
    w <- which(x == 1)
    if (length(w) == 1) return(w) else return(NA_integer_)
  })
  SIMOA$gen_health <- factor(SIMOA$gen_health,
                              levels = gh_levels, labels = gh_labels,
                              ordered = TRUE)
  cat("✓ gen_health: derived from", length(gh_cols), "checkboxes\n")
  print(table(SIMOA$gen_health, useNA = "ifany"))
  cat("\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️  gen_health not found in any format\n\n")
}

# =============================================================================
# PART G: PERSONALITY REVERSE CODING
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART G: PERSONALITY REVERSE CODING\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

reverse_items <- function(data, items, max_val, scale_name) {
  created <- character()
  cat(sprintf("%s (%d-point scale: %d - x):\n", scale_name, max_val, max_val + 1))
  for (item in items) {
    if (item %in% names(data)) {
      new_name         <- paste0(item, "_r")
      data[[new_name]] <- (max_val + 1) - as.numeric(data[[item]])
      created          <- c(created, new_name)
      cat(sprintf("  ✓ %-12s → %-14s | orig mean=%.2f | rev mean=%.2f\n",
                  item, new_name,
                  mean(as.numeric(data[[item]]), na.rm = TRUE),
                  mean(data[[new_name]],          na.rm = TRUE)))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %s not found\n", item))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
  return(list(data = data, created = created))
}

bfi_reverse   <- c("reserved", "lazy", "relaxed", "few_interests", "find_fault")
surps_reverse <- c("surps1", "surps4", "surps7", "surps13", "surps20", "surps23")

res_bfi              <- reverse_items(SIMOA, bfi_reverse,   5, "BFI")
SIMOA                <- res_bfi$data
bfi_reversed_created <- res_bfi$created

res_surps              <- reverse_items(SIMOA, surps_reverse, 4, "SURPS")
SIMOA                  <- res_surps$data
surps_reversed_created <- res_surps$created

cat("DBAS: No reverse coding needed\n")
cat("CISS: No reverse coding needed\n\n")

bfi_items   <- c("reserved","trusting","lazy","relaxed","few_interests",
                 "outgoing","find_fault","thorough","nervous","imagination")
surps_items <- paste0("surps", 1:23)
dbas_items  <- c("dbas1", paste0("dbas_", 2:16))
ciss_items  <- paste0("ciss", 1:21)

bfi_items_scored <- sapply(bfi_items, function(x) {
  if (x %in% bfi_reverse) paste0(x, "_r") else x
})
names(bfi_items_scored) <- NULL

surps_items_scored <- sapply(surps_items, function(x) {
  if (x %in% surps_reverse) paste0(x, "_r") else x
})
names(surps_items_scored) <- NULL

cat("BFI final-scored  (10):", paste(bfi_items_scored,   collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
cat("SURPS final-scored(23):", paste(surps_items_scored, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# PART H: VARIABLE SELECTION
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART H: VARIABLE SELECTION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

outcome           <- "freq_dich"
core_demographics <- c("age","sex","prov_terr","education","employment",
                        "driving_freq","income")
health_vars       <- c("phq2_score","osss_3_score","gen_health","med_quant")
length_of_use     <- "c_lengthofuse"
fall_var          <- "fall2"
bzra_dose_vars    <- c("bzra_daily_dose_eq", "bzra_weekly_dose_eq")

benefit_items     <- c("benefit_1","benefit_4","benefit_5","benefit_6")
side_effect_items <- paste0("side_effects_", 1:4)
adl_items         <- paste0("adls_", 1:2)
dependence_items  <- paste0("dependence_", 1:3)
motivation_items  <- paste0("motivation_", 1:3)
capability_items  <- c("capability_1","capability")
desires_items     <- c("desires_1","desires_2")
hcp_items         <- c("inf_hcp_1","inf_hcp_3")
withdrawal_vars   <- c("stop_wdl_exp_combined","wdl_symptom_count")
alc_use_var       <- "alc_use"

all_vars_to_keep <- c(
  outcome,
  core_demographics,
  health_vars,
  length_of_use,
  fall_var,
  condition_counts,
  sleep_aids_vars,
  alc_use_var,
  bzra_dose_vars,
  benefit_items,
  side_effect_items,
  adl_items,
  dependence_items,
  motivation_items,
  capability_items,
  desires_items,
  hcp_items,
  withdrawal_vars,
  dbas_items,
  bfi_items_scored,
  surps_items_scored,
  ciss_items
)

vars_available <- all_vars_to_keep[all_vars_to_keep %in% names(SIMOA)]
vars_missing   <- all_vars_to_keep[!all_vars_to_keep %in% names(SIMOA)]

SIMOA_analysis <- SIMOA %>% dplyr::select(all_of(vars_available))

cat(sprintf("Requested: %d | Available: %d | Missing: %d\n\n",
            length(all_vars_to_keep), length(vars_available), length(vars_missing)))

problem_v2 <- grep("_v2$|_2___[0-9]$", names(SIMOA_analysis), value = TRUE)
if (length(problem_v2) > 0) {
  cat("⚠️  WARNING: These v2 variables leaked into analysis set:\n")
  for (v in problem_v2) cat("  •", v, "\n")
} else {
  cat("✓ No v2 variables in analysis set\n\n")
}

if (length(vars_missing) > 0) {
  cat("⚠️  Missing variables:\n")
  for (v in vars_missing) cat("  •", v, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

cat("BREAKDOWN:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
report_group <- function(label, vars) {
  n <- sum(vars %in% names(SIMOA_analysis))
  t <- length(vars)
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s %d / %d\n", label, n, t))
}
report_group("Outcome (freq_dich):",             outcome)
report_group("Core demographics:",               core_demographics)
report_group("Health/clinical:",                 health_vars)
report_group("Length of use:",                   length_of_use)
report_group("Fall outcome (fall2):",            fall_var)
report_group("Condition counts:",                condition_counts)
report_group("Sleep aids:",                      sleep_aids_vars)
report_group("Alcohol use (alc_use):",           alc_use_var)
report_group("BZRA dose variables:",             bzra_dose_vars)
report_group("Benefits (4 items):",              benefit_items)
report_group("Side effects (4 items):",          side_effect_items)
report_group("ADLs (2 items):",                  adl_items)
report_group("Dependence (3 items):",            dependence_items)
report_group("Motivation (3 items):",            motivation_items)
report_group("Capability (2 items):",            capability_items)
report_group("Desires (2 items):",               desires_items)
report_group("HCP influence (2 items):",         hcp_items)
report_group("Withdrawal (combined + count):",   withdrawal_vars)
report_group("DBAS items:",                      dbas_items)
report_group("BFI items (final-scored):",        bfi_items_scored)
report_group("SURPS items (final-scored):",      surps_items_scored)
report_group("CISS items:",                      ciss_items)
cat(sprintf("\n  TOTAL: %d variables × %d observations\n\n",
            ncol(SIMOA_analysis), nrow(SIMOA_analysis)))

# =============================================================================
# PART I: VARIABLE INVENTORY
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART I: VARIABLE INVENTORY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

var_inventory <- data.frame(
  Variable    = names(SIMOA_analysis),
  Class       = sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) paste(class(x), collapse = "/")),
  N_Complete  = sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) sum(!is.na(x))),
  N_Missing   = sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) sum(is.na(x))),
  Pct_Missing = round(sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) 100 * mean(is.na(x))), 1),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

var_inventory$Domain <- dplyr::case_when(
  var_inventory$Variable == "freq_dich"                    ~ "OUTCOME",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% core_demographics            ~ "Demographics",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% health_vars                  ~ "Clinical: Health",
  var_inventory$Variable == "c_lengthofuse"                ~ "Clinical: Length of Use",
  var_inventory$Variable == "fall2"                        ~ "Clinical: Falls",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% condition_counts             ~ "Clinical: Condition Counts",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% bzra_dose_vars               ~ "Clinical: BZRA Dose",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% sleep_aids_vars              ~ "Behavioural: Sleep Aids",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% benefit_items                ~ "Beliefs: Benefits",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% side_effect_items            ~ "Beliefs: Side Effects",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% adl_items                    ~ "Beliefs: ADL Impact",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% dependence_items             ~ "Beliefs: Dependence",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% motivation_items             ~ "COM-B: Motivation",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% capability_items             ~ "COM-B: Capability",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% desires_items                ~ "COM-B: Desires",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% hcp_items                    ~ "COM-B: HCP Influence",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% withdrawal_vars              ~ "Clinical: Withdrawal",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% dbas_items                   ~ "Personality: DBAS",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% bfi_items_scored             ~ "Personality: BFI",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% surps_items_scored           ~ "Personality: SURPS",
  var_inventory$Variable %in% ciss_items                   ~ "Personality: CISS",
  TRUE                                                      ~ "Other"
)

for (dom in sort(unique(var_inventory$Domain))) {
  sub_df <- var_inventory[var_inventory$Domain == dom, ]
  cat(sprintf("── %s (%d variable%s) ──\n", dom, nrow(sub_df),
              ifelse(nrow(sub_df) == 1, "", "s")))
  print(sub_df[, c("Variable","Class","N_Complete","N_Missing","Pct_Missing")],
        row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n")
}

write.csv(var_inventory, "variable_inventory.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: variable_inventory.csv\n\n")

cat("COLUMN INDEX (for imputation verification):\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
col_df <- data.frame(
  Index       = seq_along(names(SIMOA_analysis)),
  Variable    = names(SIMOA_analysis),
  Class       = sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) paste(class(x), collapse = "/")),
  Pct_Missing = round(sapply(SIMOA_analysis, function(x) 100 * mean(is.na(x))), 1),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
print(col_df, row.names = FALSE)
cat(sprintf(
  "\n✓ %d variables | %d complete | %d with missingness | highest: %s (%.1f%%)\n\n",
  nrow(col_df),
  sum(col_df$Pct_Missing == 0),
  sum(col_df$Pct_Missing > 0),
  col_df$Variable[which.max(col_df$Pct_Missing)],
  max(col_df$Pct_Missing)
))

# =============================================================================
# PART J: SAVE
# =============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART J: SAVING\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

saveRDS(SIMOA_analysis, "SIMOA_analysis.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: SIMOA_analysis.rds\n\n")

analysis_variable_lists <- list(
  outcome          = outcome,
  demographics     = core_demographics[core_demographics %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  health           = health_vars[health_vars %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  length_of_use    = length_of_use,
  fall             = fall_var,
  condition_counts = condition_counts[condition_counts %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  sleep_aids       = sleep_aids_vars[sleep_aids_vars %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  bzra_dose        = bzra_dose_vars[bzra_dose_vars %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  benefit_items    = benefit_items[benefit_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  side_effect_items = side_effect_items[side_effect_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  adl_items        = adl_items[adl_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  dependence_items = dependence_items[dependence_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  motivation_items = motivation_items[motivation_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  capability_items = capability_items[capability_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  desires_items    = desires_items[desires_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  hcp_items        = hcp_items[hcp_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  withdrawal       = withdrawal_vars[withdrawal_vars %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  dbas             = dbas_items[dbas_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  bfi              = bfi_items_scored[bfi_items_scored %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  surps            = surps_items_scored[surps_items_scored %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  ciss             = ciss_items[ciss_items %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  bfi_reversed     = bfi_reversed_created[bfi_reversed_created %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  surps_reversed   = surps_reversed_created[surps_reversed_created %in% names(SIMOA_analysis)],
  composites = list(
    benefitsC     = list(items   = c("benefit_1","benefit_4","benefit_5","benefit_6"),
                         reverse = NULL),
    side_effectsC = list(items   = paste0("side_effects_", 1:4),
                         reverse = NULL),
    adlsC         = list(items   = paste0("adls_", 1:2),
                         reverse = NULL),
    dependenceC   = list(items   = paste0("dependence_", 1:3),
                         reverse = NULL),
    motivationC   = list(items   = paste0("motivation_", 1:3),
                         reverse = NULL),
    capabilityC   = list(items   = c("capability_1","capability"),
                         reverse = "capability",   scale_max = 5),
    pharmacistC   = list(items   = c("desires_2","inf_hcp_3"),
                         reverse = "inf_hcp_3",    scale_max = 5),
    prescriberC   = list(items   = c("desires_1","inf_hcp_1"),
                         reverse = "inf_hcp_1",    scale_max = 5)
  ),
  n_observations = nrow(SIMOA_analysis),
  n_variables    = ncol(SIMOA_analysis)
)

saveRDS(analysis_variable_lists, "analysis_variable_lists.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: analysis_variable_lists.rds\n\n")

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("✓ CHUNK 5+6 COMPLETE — READY FOR IMPUTATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("KEY DECISIONS RECORDED:\n")
cat("  • Outcome: freq_dich (0/1=stoppers, 2=continuers)\n")
cat("  • All base+v2 Likert pairs coalesced (dplyr::coalesce) into base-named variables\n")
cat("  • Withdrawal FIXED — direct overwrite, not coalesce:\n")
cat("      Reason: REDCap exports uncompleted checkboxes as 0 (not NA),\n")
cat("      so coalesce(0, real_value) = 0, blocking the stopper data.\n")
cat("      Fix: stoppers' base stop_wdl_exp___N overwritten with stop_wdl_exp_2___N.\n")
cat("  • stop_wdl_exp_combined COLLAPSED to 3 levels (unordered factor):\n")
cat("      0 = No withdrawal symptoms\n")
cat("      1 = Insomnia only\n")
cat("      2 = Other withdrawal symptoms (anxiety only, other MH only,\n")
cat("          physical only, or multiple symptom types)\n")
cat("      Rationale: original levels 2-5 were too sparse for reliable\n")
cat("      estimation (combined n ≈ 14). Stored as UNORDERED factor\n")
cat("      (nominal categories, not ordered severity scale).\n")
cat("  • wdl_symptom_count (0-4) retained as continuous predictor\n")
cat("  • BZRA dose variables renamed:\n")
cat("      bzra_daily_dose_eq  (mg/day)\n")
cat("      bzra_weekly_dose_eq (mg/week = daily × 7)\n")
cat("      'dose_eq' naming is medication-agnostic (divisors can be\n")
cat("      used to convert to any benzodiazepine equivalent)\n")
cat("  • c_lengthofuse: negative values (n=1) recoded to 0\n")
cat("  • fall2: NA → 0; levels 0-3 retained as-is\n")
cat("  • Sleep aids: NA → 0 (not a user of that substance)\n")
cat("  • BFI: 5 items reverse coded (_r suffix, originals preserved)\n")
cat("  • SURPS: 6 items reverse coded (_r suffix, originals preserved)\n")
cat("  • Composites deferred to Chunk 9; formulas stored in .rds\n")
cat(sprintf("  • Final dataset: %d obs × %d vars → SIMOA_analysis.rds\n\n",
            nrow(SIMOA_analysis), ncol(SIMOA_analysis)))
```




## Pre-Imputation
```{r}
#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 7: PRE-IMPUTATION DIAGNOSTICS & OPTIMIZATION
#==============================================================================
# Purpose: Comprehensive diagnostics before multiple imputation
# Outputs: Statistically-derived m and maxit, optimized imputation parameters
#
# KEY METHODS:
#   m     → Von Hippel (2020) two-stage FMI-based quadratic rule
#             DOI: 10.1177/0049124117747303
#             Package: howManyImputations (Errickson, CRAN)
#   maxit → Empirical convergence experiment (m=5, maxit=10/20/30/40)
#             Gelman-Rubin PSRF < 1.1 criterion
#             Gelman & Rubin (1992); Brooks & Gelman (1998)
#
# OUTCOME: freq_dich (0/1 = stoppers, 2 = continuers)
#   NOT imputed (method = "") but RETAINED in df_imputation_ready.rds
#   as a passive predictor. Including the outcome in the imputation model
#   preserves predictor-outcome associations in imputed data; excluding it
#   attenuates regression coefficients and corrupts variable-importance
#   signals for VSURF (Donders et al., 2006 J Clin Epidemiol;
#   van Buuren, 2018 §6.3.1).
#   freq_dich has complete data (0 NAs) so it is safe to use as a predictor
#   without imputing it. Its row in the predictor matrix is all zeros
#   (it does not need predictors itself); its column is set to 1 for all
#   variables with missingness.
#
# CHANGES FROM PREVIOUS VERSION:
#   • Outcome updated to freq_dich
#   • freq_dich now RETAINED in df_imp (passive predictor) rather than
#     removed; method["freq_dich"] = "" and predictor column activated
#   • Dropped: benefit_dep, safety_1:4, stop_rate_dc, med_burden vars,
#              desires_3, all reasons variables
#   • Variable type assignments updated:
#       - All Likert items (benefits, side effects, adls, dependence,
#         motivation, capability, desires, inf_hcp) → PMM
#       - fall2 → ordered (polr)
#       - wdl_symptom_count → continuous (PMM)
#       - stop_wdl_exp_combined → unordered factor, imputed with polr
#             NOW 3 LEVELS: 0=No withdrawal, 1=Insomnia only,
#             2=Other withdrawal symptoms
#             (collapsed from original 6 levels; levels 2-5 were too
#              sparse for reliable estimation, combined n ≈ 14)
#             Stored as UNORDERED factor so downstream models use dummy
#             coding, not polynomial contrasts.
#   • BZRA dose variables renamed:
#       bzra_daily_dose_eq  (was bzra_daily_diazepam_eq)
#       bzra_weekly_dose_eq (was bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq)
#       'dose_eq' naming is medication-agnostic
#   • adverse_effects list replaced with explicit item vectors
#   • mincor = 0.07 to achieve 20-25 predictors per model
#   • pilot_imp initialised before tryCatch to prevent scoping error
#   • VIF note added for stop_wdl_exp_combined / wdl_symptom_count
#   • bzra_weekly_dose_eq method set to "" (derived from daily × 7)
#==============================================================================

library(mice)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(coda)
library(howManyImputations)

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PRE-IMPUTATION DIAGNOSTICS & OPTIMIZATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# Load prepared dataset from Chunk 5+6
if (file.exists("SIMOA_analysis.rds")) {
  SIMOA_analysis <- readRDS("SIMOA_analysis.rds")
  analysis_vars  <- readRDS("analysis_variable_lists.rds")
  cat("✓ Loaded SIMOA_analysis.rds\n")
  cat("  Dimensions:", nrow(SIMOA_analysis), "rows ×",
      ncol(SIMOA_analysis), "columns\n\n")
} else {
  stop("ERROR: SIMOA_analysis.rds not found. Please run Chunk 5+6 first.")
}

# Verify reverse coding
cat("VERIFICATION: Checking reverse coding from Chunk 5+6\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
if (!is.null(analysis_vars$bfi_reversed) &&
    length(analysis_vars$bfi_reversed) > 0) {
  cat("✓ BFI items reversed:", length(analysis_vars$bfi_reversed), "\n")
  cat("  Items:", paste(analysis_vars$bfi_reversed, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️  No BFI reverse coding detected\n")
}
if (!is.null(analysis_vars$surps_reversed) &&
    length(analysis_vars$surps_reversed) > 0) {
```
