```{r}
      levels = c("No withdrawal", "Insomnia only", "Other withdrawal symptoms")
    )

  # ── Fall injury severity — levels 0-3 ───────────────────────────────────────
  if ("fall2" %in% names(df))
    df$fall2 <- factor(df$fall2, levels = 0:3,
      labels = c("No fall / not injured", "Minor injury",
                 "Serious injury", "Fall but no injury"))

  # ── Ensure Likert items are numeric ─────────────────────────────────────────
  likert_vars <- c(
    paste0("benefit_", c(1, 4, 5, 6)),
    paste0("side_effects_", 1:4),
    paste0("adls_", 1:2),
    paste0("dependence_", 1:3),
    paste0("motivation_", 1:3),
    c("capability_1", "capability"),
    c("desires_1", "desires_2"),
    c("inf_hcp_1", "inf_hcp_3"),
    c("benefitsC", "side_effectsC", "adlsC", "dependenceC",
      "motivationC", "capabilityC", "pharmacistC", "prescriberC")
  )
  for (var in likert_vars)
    if (var %in% names(df) && !is.numeric(df[[var]]))
      df[[var]] <- as.numeric(as.character(df[[var]]))

  # ── Personality subscales ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  personality_numeric_vars <- c(
    "BFI_Extraversion", "BFI_Agreeableness", "BFI_Conscientiousness",
    "BFI_Neuroticism", "BFI_Openness",
    "SURPS_Impulsivity", "SURPS_Sensation_Seeking",
    "SURPS_Hopelessness", "SURPS_Anxiety_Sensitivity",
    "DBAS_Consequences", "DBAS_Worry_Helplessness",
    "DBAS_Expectations", "DBAS_Medications",
    "CISS_Task", "CISS_Emotion", "CISS_Avoidance"
  )
  for (var in personality_numeric_vars)
    if (var %in% names(df) && !is.numeric(df[[var]]))
      df[[var]] <- as.numeric(as.character(df[[var]]))

  df
}

# Apply recoding to every imputed dataset
all_datasets <- lapply(all_imputed, recode_dataset)
cat(sprintf("✓ Recoded all %d imputed datasets (recode_dataset — Chunk 10 aligned)\n\n", m))

# Use dataset 1 for structural checks
d1 <- all_datasets[[1]]

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# OUTCOME SUMMARY — uses stopped_bzra from Chunk 9, consistent with Chunk 10
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

n_stoppers   <- sum(all_imputed[[1]]$stopped_bzra == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
n_continuers <- sum(all_imputed[[1]]$stopped_bzra == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
n_outcome_na <- sum(is.na(all_imputed[[1]]$stopped_bzra))
fd_tab       <- table(all_imputed[[1]]$freq_dich, useNA = "ifany")

cat("OUTCOME: stopped_bzra (from Chunk 9 Part B3 — used directly, not re-derived)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  stopped_bzra = 1 : Stoppers/rare users (freq_dich 0 or 1)  → STOPPERS\n")
cat("  stopped_bzra = 0 : Continuers (freq_dich 2, regular use)    → CONTINUERS\n\n")
cat("  freq_dich breakdown:\n")
for (val in names(fd_tab))
  cat(sprintf("    freq_dich = %s: n = %d (%.1f%%)\n",
              val, fd_tab[val], 100 * fd_tab[val] / N))
cat(sprintf("\n  Stoppers  (stopped_bzra = 1): n = %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            n_stoppers,   100 * n_stoppers / N))
cat(sprintf("    of which no longer uses (freq_dich 0): n = %d\n",
            sum(all_imputed[[1]]$freq_dich == 0, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("    of which < 1x/month    (freq_dich 1): n = %d\n",
            sum(all_imputed[[1]]$freq_dich == 1, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Continuers (stopped_bzra = 0): n = %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            n_continuers, 100 * n_continuers / N))
if (n_outcome_na > 0)
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Missing stopped_bzra: n = %d\n", n_outcome_na))
cat("\n")

n_events <- n_stoppers
cat(sprintf("Events for EPV calculations: %d (stoppers)\n\n", n_events))

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FULL CANDIDATE PREDICTOR SET — identical to Chunk 10 domain definitions
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("FULL CANDIDATE PREDICTOR SET\n")
cat("(Identical to Chunk 10 variable families)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# ── Demographics — identical to Chunk 10 ──────────────────────────────────────
demographics <- c(
  "age", "sex", "education", "income", "employment",
  "driving_freq", "prov_terr"
)

# ── Clinical — identical to Chunk 10 ─────────────────────────────────────────
# FIX 2: bzra_daily_dose_eq (was bzra_daily_diazepam_eq — renamed in Chunk 5+6)
clinical <- c(
  "phq2_score", "osss_3_score", "gen_health", "med_quant",
  "n_physical_conditions", "n_ment_conditions", "n_sleep_conditions",
  "n_health_conditions",
  "bzra_daily_dose_eq",
  "c_lengthofuse",
  "fall2",
  "alc_use"
)

# ── Sleep / Adverse effects — identical to Chunk 10 ──────────────────────────
# stop_wdl_exp_combined included (consistent with Chunk 10).
# wdl_symptom_count also retained.
sleep_adverse <- c(
  "alc_sleep", "can_sleep", "melatonin_use", "op_sleep",
  "stop_wdl_exp_combined", "wdl_symptom_count"
)

# ── Beliefs / COM-B composites — identical to Chunk 10 ───────────────────────
beliefs_comob <- c(
  "benefitsC", "side_effectsC", "adlsC", "dependenceC",
  "motivationC", "capabilityC", "pharmacistC", "prescriberC"
)

# ── Personality subscales — identical to Chunk 10 ────────────────────────────
# DBAS_Total excluded — collinear with subscales (consistent with Chunk 10)
personality <- c(
  "BFI_Extraversion", "BFI_Agreeableness", "BFI_Conscientiousness",
  "BFI_Neuroticism", "BFI_Openness",
  "SURPS_Impulsivity", "SURPS_Sensation_Seeking",
  "SURPS_Hopelessness", "SURPS_Anxiety_Sensitivity",
  "DBAS_Consequences", "DBAS_Worry_Helplessness",
  "DBAS_Expectations", "DBAS_Medications",
  "CISS_Task", "CISS_Emotion", "CISS_Avoidance"
)

all_vars_declared <- unique(c(demographics, clinical, sleep_adverse,
                               beliefs_comob, personality))
all_vars          <- all_vars_declared[all_vars_declared %in% names(d1)]

# Domain lookup — mirrors Chunk 10 get_family()
get_family <- function(var) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    var %in% demographics  ~ "Demographics",
    var %in% clinical      ~ "Clinical",
    var %in% sleep_adverse ~ "Sleep_Adverse",
    var %in% beliefs_comob ~ "Beliefs_COMB",
    var %in% personality   ~ "Personality",
    TRUE                   ~ "Other"
  )
}

cat(sprintf("Demographics   (%2d): %s\n",
            sum(all_vars %in% demographics),
            paste(all_vars[all_vars %in% demographics], collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Clinical       (%2d): %s\n",
            sum(all_vars %in% clinical),
            paste(all_vars[all_vars %in% clinical], collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Sleep/Adverse  (%2d): %s\n",
            sum(all_vars %in% sleep_adverse),
            paste(all_vars[all_vars %in% sleep_adverse], collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Beliefs/COM-B  (%2d): %s\n",
            sum(all_vars %in% beliefs_comob),
            paste(all_vars[all_vars %in% beliefs_comob], collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Personality    (%2d): %s\n",
            sum(all_vars %in% personality),
            paste(all_vars[all_vars %in% personality], collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("\nTotal candidate predictors (after availability check): %d\n",
            length(all_vars)))
cat("DBAS_Total excluded (collinear with subscales)\n")
cat("stop_wdl_exp_combined included (3-level unordered factor — consistent with Chunk 10)\n")
cat("wdl_symptom_count included (continuous withdrawal symptom count)\n")
cat("bzra_daily_dose_eq used (renamed from bzra_daily_diazepam_eq in Chunk 5+6)\n\n")

missing_vars <- all_vars_declared[!all_vars_declared %in% names(d1)]
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("⚠️  %d declared variables not found in data (excluded):\n",
              length(missing_vars)))
  for (v in missing_vars) cat("  •", v, "\n")
  cat("\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("✓ All %d declared variables confirmed in imputed data\n\n",
              length(all_vars_declared)))
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CATEGORICAL vs CONTINUOUS VARIABLE LISTS — aligned with Chunk 10
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat_vars <- c(
  "sex", "education", "income", "employment", "driving_freq",
  "prov_terr", "gen_health", "alc_use",
  "stop_wdl_exp_combined", "fall2"
)
cat_vars  <- cat_vars[cat_vars %in% all_vars]
cont_vars <- all_vars[!all_vars %in% cat_vars]

cat(sprintf("Categorical variables (kept as factors): %d\n", length(cat_vars)))
cat(sprintf("  %s\n", paste(cat_vars, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Continuous/ordinal variables:            %d\n\n", length(cont_vars)))

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# EVENTS-PER-VARIABLE CHECK
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

epv_input <- round(n_events / length(all_vars), 1)

cat("EPV CHECK (input variables):\n")
cat(sprintf("  Stoppers (events): %d\n", n_events))
cat(sprintf("  Continuers:        %d\n", n_continuers))
cat(sprintf("  Input variables:   %d\n", length(all_vars)))
cat(sprintf("  EPV at input:      %.1f\n", epv_input))
cat("  Note: EPV constraint applies to the FINAL regression model,\n")
cat("  not to VSURF input. VSURF will reduce this to a feasible set.\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PRE-LOOP NA DIAGNOSTIC
# Runs on d1 (already recoded imputation 1). Any NAs here signal a recode
# mismatch — the data are fully imputed so NAs should be zero.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PRE-LOOP NA DIAGNOSTIC (imputation 1)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

diag_X    <- d1[, all_vars, drop = FALSE]
na_report <- sapply(diag_X, function(col) sum(is.na(col)))
na_report <- na_report[na_report > 0]

if (length(na_report) == 0) {
  cat("✓ No NAs after recoding — data are clean.\n\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("⚠️  %d variable(s) have NAs after recoding:\n\n", length(na_report)))
  for (v in names(na_report)) {
    raw_vals <- sort(unique(all_imputed[[1]][[v]]))
    cat(sprintf("  %-30s  NAs: %d   Raw values in data: %s\n",
                v, na_report[v], paste(head(raw_vals, 20), collapse = ", ")))
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("ACTION REQUIRED: Update recode_dataset() so all observed values\n")
  cat("are matched. Then re-run this chunk.\n\n")
  stop("Stopping — fix NA-producing recodes before running VSURF.")
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MAJORITY-VOTE VSURF ACROSS ALL m IMPUTATIONS
#
# FIX: majority_threshold now correctly derived from the loaded m value
# (ceiling(m * 0.25)) rather than being computed from a hardcoded 42.
# With m=24: ceiling(24 * 0.25) = 6.
# With m=42: ceiling(42 * 0.25) = 11.
# The threshold scales automatically regardless of how many imputations
# were run.
#
# VSURF settings:
#   ntree       = 2000  trees per forest
#   nfor.thres  = 20    iterations for threshold step
#   nfor.interp = 20    iterations for interpretation step
#   nfor.pred   = 20    iterations for prediction step
#   mtry        = floor(sqrt(p))
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat(sprintf("RUNNING VSURF ON ALL %d IMPUTATIONS\n", m))
cat("(expect 30-60 minutes)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

majority_threshold <- ceiling(m * 0.25)

cat(sprintf("Majority-vote threshold (all VSURF sets): ≥ %d / %d runs (≥ 25%% of imputations)\n\n",
            majority_threshold, m))

thres_list  <- vector("list", m)
interp_list <- vector("list", m)
pred_list   <- vector("list", m)
imp_list    <- vector("list", m)
failed_runs <- integer(0)

start_time <- Sys.time()

for (i in seq_len(m)) {

  cat(sprintf("  Imputation %2d / %d ... ", i, m))

  df <- all_datasets[[i]]

  X <- df[, all_vars, drop = FALSE]

  for (v in cat_vars)
    if (v %in% names(X) && is.factor(X[[v]]))
      X[[v]] <- droplevels(X[[v]])

  for (v in names(X))
    if (!is.factor(X[[v]]) && !is.numeric(X[[v]]))
      X[[v]] <- as.numeric(as.character(X[[v]]))

  X <- as.data.frame(X)

  # Use stopped_bzra directly from Chunk 9 — consistent with Chunk 10
  y  <- factor(df[["stopped_bzra"]], levels = c(0, 1),
               labels = c("Continuer", "Stopper"))
  ok <- !is.na(y)
  X  <- X[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  y  <- droplevels(y[ok])

  set.seed(12345 + i)

  vsurf_i <- tryCatch(
    VSURF(
      x           = X,
      y           = y,
      ntree       = 2000,
      nfor.thres  = 20,
      nfor.interp = 20,
      nfor.pred   = 20,
      mtry        = max(floor(sqrt(ncol(X))), 1),
      parallel    = FALSE,
      verbose     = FALSE
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("FAILED (%s)\n", e$message))
      NULL
    }
  )

  if (is.null(vsurf_i)) {
    failed_runs      <- c(failed_runs, i)
    thres_list[[i]]  <- character(0)
    interp_list[[i]] <- character(0)
    pred_list[[i]]   <- character(0)
    imp_list[[i]]    <- setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_vars)), all_vars)
    next
  }

  thres_list[[i]]  <- all_vars[vsurf_i$varselect.thres]
  interp_list[[i]] <- all_vars[vsurf_i$varselect.interp]
  pred_list[[i]]   <- all_vars[vsurf_i$varselect.pred]

  imp_vec <- setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_vars)), all_vars)
  imp_vec[all_vars] <- vsurf_i$imp.mean.dec
  imp_list[[i]] <- imp_vec

  cat(sprintf("thres=%d, pred=%d\n",
              length(thres_list[[i]]), length(pred_list[[i]])))
}

end_time   <- Sys.time()
time_taken <- round(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "mins"), 2)
cat(sprintf("\n✓ VSURF completed in %.1f minutes\n", time_taken))
if (length(failed_runs) > 0)
  cat(sprintf("⚠️  Failed runs: %s\n", paste(failed_runs, collapse = ", ")))
cat("\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MAJORITY VOTE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MAJORITY-VOTE RESULTS\n")
cat(sprintf("Threshold: >= %d / %d runs (>= 25%% of imputations)\n",
            majority_threshold, m))
cat("Applied uniformly to threshold, interpretation, and prediction sets.\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

count_selections <- function(sel_list, varnames) {
  counts <- setNames(integer(length(varnames)), varnames)
  for (s in sel_list)
    counts[intersect(s, varnames)] <- counts[intersect(s, varnames)] + 1L
  sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE)
}

thres_counts  <- count_selections(thres_list,  all_vars)
interp_counts <- count_selections(interp_list, all_vars)
pred_counts   <- count_selections(pred_list,   all_vars)

majority_thres  <- names(thres_counts[ thres_counts  >= majority_threshold])
majority_interp <- names(interp_counts[interp_counts >= majority_threshold])
majority_pred   <- names(pred_counts[  pred_counts   >= majority_threshold])

valid_imp <- imp_list[!sapply(imp_list, function(x) all(is.na(x)))]
mean_imp  <- if (length(valid_imp) > 0) {
  colMeans(do.call(rbind, valid_imp), na.rm = TRUE)
} else setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_vars)), all_vars)

importance_df <- data.frame(
  Variable        = all_vars,
  Domain          = get_family(all_vars),
  Mean_Importance = mean_imp[all_vars],
  Thres_Count     = as.integer(thres_counts[all_vars]),
  Interp_Count    = as.integer(interp_counts[all_vars]),
  Pred_Count      = as.integer(pred_counts[all_vars]),
  Majority_Thres  = all_vars %in% majority_thres,
  Majority_Interp = all_vars %in% majority_interp,
  Majority_Pred   = all_vars %in% majority_pred,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_Importance))

cat("SELECTION COUNTS (out of", m, "runs) — sorted by mean importance:\n\n")
print(importance_df %>%
        select(Variable, Domain, Mean_Importance,
               Thres_Count, Interp_Count, Pred_Count),
      row.names = FALSE, digits = 4)
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("MAJORITY THRESHOLD SET  (≥%d/%d, ≥25%%): %d variables\n",
            majority_threshold, m, length(majority_thres)))
for (v in majority_thres)
  cat(sprintf("  • %-35s (%d/%d)  [%s]\n", v, thres_counts[v], m, get_family(v)))
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("MAJORITY INTERPRETATION SET (≥%d/%d, ≥25%%): %d variables\n",
            majority_threshold, m, length(majority_interp)))
for (v in majority_interp)
  cat(sprintf("  • %-35s (%d/%d)  [%s]\n", v, interp_counts[v], m, get_family(v)))
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("MAJORITY PREDICTION SET (≥%d/%d, ≥25%%): %d variables\n",
            majority_threshold, m, length(majority_pred)))
cat("→ USE THESE FOR LOGISTIC REGRESSION\n")
for (v in majority_pred)
  cat(sprintf("  • %-35s (%d/%d)  [%s]\n", v, pred_counts[v], m, get_family(v)))
cat("\n")

if (length(majority_pred) > 0) {
  epv_pred <- round(n_events / length(majority_pred), 1)
  cat(sprintf("EPV with prediction set: %d stoppers / %d predictors = %.1f\n",
              n_events, length(majority_pred), epv_pred))
  if (epv_pred >= 10)
    cat("✓ EPV ≥ 10 — adequate for logistic regression\n\n")
  else if (epv_pred >= 5)
    cat("~  EPV 5-9 — acceptable; interpret with caution\n\n")
  else
    cat("⚠️  EPV < 5 — consider raising the threshold before regression\n\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️  No variables met the prediction threshold.\n")
  cat("   Review pred_counts in the saved RDS.\n\n")
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DOMAIN BREAKDOWN OF PREDICTION SET
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PREDICTION SET — BY DOMAIN\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

domain_totals <- c(
  Demographics  = sum(all_vars %in% demographics),
  Clinical      = sum(all_vars %in% clinical),
  Sleep_Adverse = sum(all_vars %in% sleep_adverse),
  Beliefs_COMB  = sum(all_vars %in% beliefs_comob),
  Personality   = sum(all_vars %in% personality)
)

if (length(majority_pred) > 0) {
  pred_domain_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = majority_pred,
    Domain   = get_family(majority_pred),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  domain_summary <- pred_domain_df %>%
    count(Domain, name = "N_Selected") %>%
    mutate(N_Total = domain_totals[Domain],
           Pct     = round(100 * N_Selected / N_Total, 1)) %>%
    arrange(desc(N_Selected))

  print(domain_summary, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n")

  cat("Prediction set variables by domain:\n\n")
  for (dom in domain_summary$Domain) {
    vars_in <- pred_domain_df$Variable[pred_domain_df$Domain == dom]
    cat(sprintf("%s (%d):\n", dom, length(vars_in)))
    for (v in vars_in)
      cat(sprintf("  • %-35s (%d/%d)\n", v, pred_counts[v], m))
    cat("\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("⚠️  Prediction set is empty.\n\n")
  domain_summary <- data.frame()
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# COMPARE WITH PERSONALITY-ONLY MODEL (11A)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("COMPARISON WITH PERSONALITY-ONLY MODEL (CHUNK 11A)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

if (file.exists("VSURF_personality_selected.rds")) {
  pers_pred <- readRDS("VSURF_personality_selected.rds")

  in_both   <- intersect(majority_pred, pers_pred)
  only_full <- setdiff(majority_pred,   pers_pred)
  only_pers <- setdiff(pers_pred,       majority_pred)

  cat(sprintf("Personality model prediction set (11A): %d variables\n", length(pers_pred)))
  cat(sprintf("Full model prediction set (11B):        %d variables\n", length(majority_pred)))
  cat(sprintf("In both:                                %d variables\n", length(in_both)))
  cat(sprintf("Only in full model:                     %d variables\n", length(only_full)))
  cat(sprintf("Only in personality model:              %d variables\n\n", length(only_pers)))

  if (length(in_both) > 0) {
    cat("Shared variables:\n")
    for (v in in_both) cat(sprintf("  • %-35s [%s]\n", v, get_family(v)))
    cat("\n")
  }
  if (length(only_full) > 0) {
    cat("Added by full model:\n")
    for (v in only_full) cat(sprintf("  • %-35s [%s]\n", v, get_family(v)))
    cat("\n")
  }
  if (length(only_pers) > 0) {
    cat("In personality model but dropped by full model:\n")
    for (v in only_pers) cat(sprintf("  • %-35s [%s]\n", v, get_family(v)))
    cat("\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("VSURF_personality_selected.rds not found — skipping comparison.\n\n")
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# VISUALIZATIONS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Creating visualizations...\n")

plot_top <- importance_df %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  mutate(In_Pred = Majority_Pred)

p1 <- ggplot(plot_top,
             aes(x     = reorder(Variable, Mean_Importance),
                 y     = Mean_Importance,
                 fill  = Domain,
                 alpha = In_Pred)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%d/%d", Pred_Count, m)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.0) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1.0, "FALSE" = 0.35),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "In prediction set",
                                "FALSE" = "Not selected"),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Domain") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))) +
  labs(
    title    = "Variable Importance — Full Predictor Set (Top 20)",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "VSURF majority vote across %d imputations  |  Stoppers (n=%d) vs Continuers (n=%d)  |  prediction set: %d variable(s)",
      m, n_stoppers, n_continuers, length(majority_pred)),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean Variable Importance (averaged across imputations)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

ggsave("VSURF_full_importance_top20.png", p1, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
cat("✓ Saved: VSURF_full_importance_top20.png\n")

stab_vars <- importance_df %>%
  filter(Majority_Thres | Thres_Count >= 5) %>%
  arrange(Mean_Importance) %>%
  pull(Variable)

if (length(stab_vars) == 0) {
  cat("⚠️  No variables reached threshold in any run — skipping stability heatmap.\n\n")
} else {

  stability_data <- importance_df %>%
    filter(Variable %in% stab_vars) %>%
    select(Variable, Domain, Thres_Count, Interp_Count, Pred_Count) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols      = c(Thres_Count, Interp_Count, Pred_Count),
                 names_to  = "Step",
                 values_to = "Count") %>%
    mutate(
      Step = factor(Step,
                    levels = c("Thres_Count", "Interp_Count", "Pred_Count"),
                    labels = c("Threshold", "Interpretation", "Prediction")),
      Variable = factor(Variable, levels = stab_vars)
    )

  p2 <- ggplot(stability_data, aes(x = Step, y = Variable, fill = Count)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(aes(label = Count), size = 2.8, colour = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    facet_grid(Domain ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#d9edf7", high = "#1a5276",
                        limits = c(0, m),
                        name  = sprintf("Times\nselected\n(max %d)", m)) +
    labs(
      title    = "VSURF Selection Stability — Full Model",
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "Majority threshold: ≥%d/%d (≥25%% of imputations), all VSURF steps  |  Stoppers (n=%d) vs Continuers (n=%d)",
        majority_threshold, m, n_stoppers, n_continuers),
      x = "VSURF Step",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9),
      strip.text.y    = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.spacing.y = unit(0.3, "lines")
    )

  ggsave("VSURF_full_stability.png", p2,
         width  = 9,
         height = max(8, length(stab_vars) * 0.35 + 3),
         dpi    = 300)
  cat("✓ Saved: VSURF_full_stability.png\n\n")
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SAVE RESULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("SAVING RESULTS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

vsurf_full_output <- list(
  majority_pred    = majority_pred,
  majority_interp  = majority_interp,
  majority_thres   = majority_thres,
  pred_list        = pred_list,
  interp_list      = interp_list,
  thres_list       = thres_list,
  importance_df    = importance_df,
  pred_counts      = pred_counts,
  interp_counts    = interp_counts,
  thres_counts     = thres_counts,
  domain_summary   = domain_summary,
  metadata = list(
    input_vars                        = all_vars,
    outcome                           = "stopped_bzra",
    outcome_coding                    = "1=stopper (freq_dich 0 or 1), 0=continuer (freq_dich 2)",
    outcome_source                    = "Chunk 9 Part B3 — used directly, not re-derived",
    m                                 = m,
    N                                 = N,
    n_stoppers                        = n_stoppers,
    n_continuers                      = n_continuers,
    majority_threshold                = majority_threshold,
    pct_threshold                     = 25,
    threshold_applied_uniformly       = TRUE,
    n_pred_selected                   = length(majority_pred),
    n_interp_selected                 = length(majority_interp),
    n_thres_selected                  = length(majority_thres),
    vsurf_ntree                       = 2000,
    vsurf_nfor                        = 20,
    vsurf_mtry_rule                   = "floor(sqrt(p))",
    failed_runs                       = failed_runs,
    time_minutes                      = as.numeric(time_taken),
    seed_base                         = 12345,
    stop_wdl_exp_combined_included    = TRUE,
    stop_wdl_exp_combined_levels      = "3-level unordered factor: No withdrawal | Insomnia only | Other withdrawal symptoms",
    wdl_symptom_count_included        = TRUE,
    DBAS_Total_excluded               = TRUE,
    bzra_dose_var_used                = "bzra_daily_dose_eq (renamed from bzra_daily_diazepam_eq in Chunk 5+6)",
    variable_families_match_chunk10   = TRUE,
    fall2_levels                      = "0=No fall/not injured, 1=Minor injury, 2=Serious injury, 3=Fall but no injury (VSURF fix)"
  )
)

saveRDS(vsurf_full_output,  "VSURF_full_results.rds")
saveRDS(majority_pred,      "VSURF_full_selected.rds")
write.csv(importance_df,    "VSURF_full_importance_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("✓ Saved: VSURF_full_results.rds\n")
cat("✓ Saved: VSURF_full_selected.rds\n")
cat("✓ Saved: VSURF_full_importance_table.csv\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SUMMARY
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 11B COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat(sprintf("VSURF ran on %d imputations (%d failed)\n", m, length(failed_runs)))
cat(sprintf("VSURF settings: ntree=2000, nfor=20 per step, mtry=floor(sqrt(p))\n"))
cat(sprintf("Outcome: stopped_bzra (from Chunk 9 — 1=stopper, 0=continuer)\n"))
cat(sprintf("Stoppers (events): %d  |  Continuers: %d\n\n", n_stoppers, n_continuers))

cat(sprintf("Majority thresholds: ≥%d/%d (≥25%% of imputations), applied uniformly to all VSURF sets\n\n",
            majority_threshold, m))

cat("FINAL SELECTIONS:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Threshold set:      %d variables\n", length(majority_thres)))
cat(sprintf("  Interpretation set: %d variables\n", length(majority_interp)))
cat(sprintf("  Prediction set:     %d variables  ← FOR REGRESSION\n\n",
            length(majority_pred)))

if (length(majority_pred) > 0) {
  cat("PREDICTION SET:\n")
  for (i in seq_along(majority_pred))
    cat(sprintf("  %2d. %-35s (%d/%d)  [%s]\n",
                i, majority_pred[i], pred_counts[majority_pred[i]],
                m, get_family(majority_pred[i])))
  cat(sprintf("\n  EPV: %d stoppers / %d predictors = %.1f\n",
              n_events, length(majority_pred),
              n_events / length(majority_pred)))
}

cat("\nFILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  1. VSURF_full_results.rds\n")
cat("  2. VSURF_full_selected.rds\n")
cat("  3. VSURF_full_importance_table.csv\n")
cat("  4. VSURF_full_importance_top20.png\n")
cat("  5. VSURF_full_stability.png\n\n")

cat("NOTES:\n")
cat("  - Outcome: stopped_bzra from Chunk 9 Part B3 (used directly — not re-derived)\n")
cat("    1 = Stoppers (freq_dich 0 or 1)  |  0 = Continuers (freq_dich 2)\n")
cat("  - Variable families identical to Chunk 10\n")
cat("  - stop_wdl_exp_combined: 3-level unordered factor\n")
cat("      'No withdrawal' | 'Insomnia only' | 'Other withdrawal symptoms'\n")
cat("      Recoded by matching existing labels (not numeric levels) to prevent NAs\n")
cat("  - bzra_daily_dose_eq used (renamed from bzra_daily_diazepam_eq in Chunk 5+6)\n")
cat("  - wdl_symptom_count included as continuous predictor\n")
cat("  - DBAS_Total excluded (collinear with subscales)\n")
cat("  - fall2 levels 0-3 all coded (level 3 = fall but no injury; VSURF NA fix)\n")
cat(sprintf("  - Majority threshold: ceiling(m * 0.25) = ceiling(%d * 0.25) = %d\n",
            m, majority_threshold))
cat("    >= 25% of imputations, applied uniformly to all VSURF sets\n\n")

cat("REFERENCES:\n")
cat("  Genuer et al. (2015). VSURF. R Journal, 7(2):19-33.\n")
cat("  Rubin, D.B. (1987). Multiple Imputation for Nonresponse in Surveys.\n\n")

cat("✓ Ready for Chunk 12B: logistic regression (full model)\n")
cat("✓ Ready for Chunk 12C: DeLong's test (model comparison)\n\n")
```




## LR
```{r}
#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 12: LOGISTIC REGRESSION — PERSONALITY vs FULL MODEL + DELONG'S TEST
#==============================================================================
# Purpose:
#   Fit two logistic regression models using VSURF interpretation sets:
#     Model A — Personality-only predictors (from Chunk 11A)
#     Model B — Full predictor set (from Chunk 11B)
#   Compare discriminative ability using DeLong's test.
#   Both raw and standardized (mean=0, SD=1) versions are fitted for
#   continuous predictors so that coefficient magnitudes are comparable
#   across variables and scales.
#
# Variable sets:
#   Both models use the VSURF INTERPRETATION set (Step 2), which retains all
#   variables useful for understanding the outcome. This is appropriate when
#   the goal is both explanation and prediction, and ensures the models are
#   a meaningful representation of their respective predictor domains.
#   The prediction set (Step 3) is noted for reference but not used here.
#
# Standardization:
#   Only continuous predictors are standardized (z-scored: subtract mean,
#   divide by SD, pooled across imputations). Factors (categorical variables)
#   are left untouched in both versions. Standardization is applied to each
#   imputed dataset independently using its own mean and SD (the variation
#   across imputations is negligible for fully imputed data). Coefficients
#   from the standardized model represent the change in log-odds per 1 SD
#   increase in the predictor, making effect sizes directly comparable across
#   variables with different scales (e.g. DBAS subscales vs age vs dose).
#   Raw-score models retain the original units for interpretability.
#   AUC, DeLong's test, and diagnostics use the raw models (standardization
#   does not affect predicted probabilities or model fit).
#
# Outcome:
#   stopped_bzra (from Chunk 9 Part B3 — used directly, not re-derived)
#     1 = Stoppers (freq_dich 0 or 1)
#     0 = Continuers (freq_dich 2)
#
# AUC:
#   Calculated per imputation via pROC; bootstrap CIs (B = 2000) within each
#   imputation. Mean AUC and mean CI bounds reported across imputations
#   (Rubin's rules are not directly applicable to AUC).
#
# DeLong's test (MI pooling):
#   DeLong's test is applied per imputation. ΔAUC and its DeLong SE are
#   extracted per imputation, then pooled using Rubin's rules applied to
#   ΔAUC directly (not to z-statistics). This follows Li & Fine (2010):
#
#     Q_bar  = mean(ΔAUC_i)                         — pooled ΔAUC
#     U_bar  = mean(SE_i^2)                         — within-imputation variance
#     B      = var(ΔAUC_i)                          — between-imputation variance
#     T      = U_bar + (1 + 1/m) * B               — total variance
#     z_pool = Q_bar / sqrt(T)                      — pooled z-statistic
#     df     = (m-1) * (1 + U_bar/((1+1/m)*B))^2   — Barnard & Rubin df
#
#   Pooling ΔAUC (not z) is correct because ΔAUC is the estimand of interest.
#   The SE is extracted as |ΔAUC / z| from each pROC roc.test() call.
#
# BZRA dose variable:
#   bzra_daily_dose_eq (renamed from bzra_daily_diazepam_eq in Chunk 5+6).
#   Chunk 11B saves this correct name directly into VSURF_full_results.rds,
#   so no name remapping is needed in this chunk.
#
# References:
#   DeLong ER, DeLong DM, Clarke-Pearson DL (1988). Biometrics, 44:837–845.
#   Li J, Fine JP (2010). Comparing two AUCs with MI data. Biostatistics.
#   Rubin DB (1987). Multiple Imputation for Nonresponse in Surveys.
#   Barnard J, Rubin DB (1999). Degrees of freedom. Biometrika, 86:948–955.
#==============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(mice)
library(pROC)
library(broom)
library(car)

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 12: LOGISTIC REGRESSION + DELONG'S TEST\n")
cat("Personality (11A) vs Full model (11B)\n")
cat("Both models use VSURF INTERPRETATION set (Step 2)\n")
cat("Both RAW and STANDARDIZED coefficient versions fitted\n")
cat("Outcome: stopped_bzra (from Chunk 9 Part B3)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART A: LOAD DATA AND VSURF RESULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART A: Loading data and VSURF results\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

if (!file.exists("imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds"))
  stop("ERROR: imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds not found. Run Chunk 9 first.")

imputed_list <- readRDS("imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds")
m            <- length(imputed_list)
N            <- nrow(imputed_list[[1]])

cat(sprintf("✓ Loaded imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Imputations (m): %d\n", m))
cat(sprintf("  Observations (N): %d\n\n", N))

if (!file.exists("VSURF_personality_results.rds"))
  stop("ERROR: VSURF_personality_results.rds not found. Run Chunk 11A first.")
vsurf_pers <- readRDS("VSURF_personality_results.rds")

if (!file.exists("VSURF_full_results.rds"))
  stop("ERROR: VSURF_full_results.rds not found. Run Chunk 11B first.")
vsurf_full <- readRDS("VSURF_full_results.rds")

outcome_var <- "stopped_bzra"

if (!outcome_var %in% names(imputed_list[[1]]))
  stop(sprintf("ERROR: '%s' not found in imputed data — check Chunk 9 Part B3.", outcome_var))

n_stoppers   <- sum(imputed_list[[1]][[outcome_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
n_continuers <- sum(imputed_list[[1]][[outcome_var]] == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
n_events     <- n_stoppers

cat(sprintf("Outcome: %s\n", outcome_var))
cat(sprintf("  Stoppers   (= 1): %d (%.1f%%)\n", n_stoppers,   100 * n_stoppers / N))
cat(sprintf("  Continuers (= 0): %d (%.1f%%)\n", n_continuers, 100 * n_continuers / N))
cat(sprintf("  Events for EPV:   %d\n\n", n_events))

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART B: DEFINE VARIABLE SETS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART B: Defining variable sets\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

vars_A      <- vsurf_pers$majority_interp
vars_B      <- vsurf_full$majority_interp
vars_A_pred <- vsurf_pers$majority_pred
vars_B_pred <- vsurf_full$majority_pred

if (length(vars_A) == 0)
  stop("Model A: VSURF interpretation set is empty. Review Chunk 11A.")
if (length(vars_B) == 0)
  stop("Model B: VSURF interpretation set is empty. Review Chunk 11B.")

cat(sprintf("Model A — Personality VSURF interpretation set (%d variables):\n",
            length(vars_A)))
for (v in vars_A) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat(sprintf("  [Prediction set (%d): %s]\n\n",
            length(vars_A_pred),
            if (length(vars_A_pred) == 0) "(none)" else paste(vars_A_pred, collapse = ", ")))

cat(sprintf("Model B — Full VSURF interpretation set (%d variables):\n",
            length(vars_B)))
for (v in vars_B) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat(sprintf("  [Prediction set (%d): %s]\n\n",
            length(vars_B_pred),
            if (length(vars_B_pred) == 0) "(none)" else paste(vars_B_pred, collapse = ", ")))

check_vars <- function(vars, label) {
  missing <- vars[!vars %in% names(imputed_list[[1]])]
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("⚠️  %s: %d variables not found:\n", label, length(missing)))
    for (v in missing) cat(sprintf("     • %s\n", v))
    stop("Fix missing variables before proceeding.")
  }
}
check_vars(vars_A, "Model A")
check_vars(vars_B, "Model B")
cat("✓ All predictor variables confirmed in imputed data\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART C: EPV CHECK
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART C: EPV check\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

epv_status <- function(epv) {
  if (epv >= 10) "✓ Adequate (≥10)"
  else if (epv >= 5) "~ Borderline (5–9)"
  else "⚠️  Low (<5) — interpret with caution"
}

epv_A <- round(n_events / length(vars_A), 1)
epv_B <- round(n_events / length(vars_B), 1)

cat(sprintf("Model A: %d events / %d predictors = EPV %.1f  %s\n",
            n_events, length(vars_A), epv_A, epv_status(epv_A)))
cat(sprintf("Model B: %d events / %d predictors = EPV %.1f  %s\n\n",
            n_events, length(vars_B), epv_B, epv_status(epv_B)))

if (epv_A < 5 || epv_B < 5)
  cat("NOTE: EPV < 5 increases risk of overfitting. Report results cautiously.\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART D: STANDARDIZATION HELPER
#
# Continuous predictors are z-scored within each imputed dataset.
# Factors are left untouched. Standardization is applied independently per
# imputation (variation in means/SDs across fully imputed datasets is
# negligible). Returns the modified dataset and a log of what was scaled.
#
# Only applied to the standardized model list; raw list is unchanged.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART D: Standardization setup\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

# Identify which variables in a given set are continuous (not factor)
# in the first imputed dataset, to determine what gets standardized.
get_continuous_vars <- function(vars, data) {
  vars[sapply(vars, function(v) is.numeric(data[[v]]))]
}

cont_A <- get_continuous_vars(vars_A, imputed_list[[1]])
cont_B <- get_continuous_vars(vars_B, imputed_list[[1]])

cat(sprintf("Model A — continuous predictors to standardize (%d):\n", length(cont_A)))
for (v in cont_A) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat(sprintf("Model A — factors left on original scale (%d):\n",
            length(vars_A) - length(cont_A)))
for (v in vars_A[!vars_A %in% cont_A]) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("Model B — continuous predictors to standardize (%d):\n", length(cont_B)))
for (v in cont_B) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat(sprintf("Model B — factors left on original scale (%d):\n",
            length(vars_B) - length(cont_B)))
for (v in vars_B[!vars_B %in% cont_B]) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat("\n")

# Function: standardize continuous predictors in a single dataset
standardize_dataset <- function(df, cont_vars) {
  for (v in cont_vars) {
    m_v  <- mean(df[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
    sd_v <- sd(df[[v]],   na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.na(sd_v) && sd_v > 0)
      df[[v]] <- (df[[v]] - m_v) / sd_v
  }
  df
}

# Build standardized imputed lists for A and B
# (each list standardizes only the variables used in that model)
all_cont_to_std <- unique(c(cont_A, cont_B))

imputed_std_A <- lapply(imputed_list, standardize_dataset, cont_vars = cont_A)
imputed_std_B <- lapply(imputed_list, standardize_dataset, cont_vars = cont_B)

cat("✓ Standardized imputed lists created for Model A and Model B\n")
cat("  (Factors untouched; continuous vars z-scored per imputation)\n\n")

# Spot-check: mean and SD of first continuous variable in imputation 1
if (length(cont_A) > 0) {
  v_chk <- cont_A[1]
  cat(sprintf("Spot-check standardization (Model A, imputation 1, '%s'):\n", v_chk))
  cat(sprintf("  Raw:  mean=%.4f  SD=%.4f\n",
              mean(imputed_list[[1]][[v_chk]],     na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(imputed_list[[1]][[v_chk]],       na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  Std:  mean=%.4f  SD=%.4f  (expect ≈0 and ≈1)\n\n",
              mean(imputed_std_A[[1]][[v_chk]],   na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(imputed_std_A[[1]][[v_chk]],     na.rm = TRUE)))
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART E: FIT MODELS — RAW AND STANDARDIZED
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART E: Fitting models (raw and standardized)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

formula_A <- as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(vars_A, collapse = " + ")))
formula_B <- as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(vars_B, collapse = " + ")))

cat(sprintf("Formula A: %s\n\n", deparse(formula_A)))
cat(sprintf("Formula B: %s\n\n", deparse(formula_B)))

fit_models <- function(data_list, formula_obj, label) {
  mm    <- length(data_list)
  fits  <- vector("list", mm)
  fails <- integer(0)
  for (i in seq_len(mm)) {
    fits[[i]] <- tryCatch(
      glm(formula_obj, data = data_list[[i]], family = binomial()),
      error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  %s imputation %d FAILED: %s\n", label, i, e$message))
        fails <<- c(fails, i)
        NULL
      }
    )
  }
  if (length(fails) > 0)
    cat(sprintf("⚠️  %s: %d failed: %s\n",
                label, length(fails), paste(fails, collapse = ", ")))
  structure(fits, failed = fails)
}

cat("Fitting Model A — raw...\n")
fits_A_raw <- fit_models(imputed_list,  formula_A, "Model A raw")
cat("Fitting Model A — standardized...\n")
fits_A_std <- fit_models(imputed_std_A, formula_A, "Model A std")
cat("Fitting Model B — raw...\n")
fits_B_raw <- fit_models(imputed_list,  formula_B, "Model B raw")
cat("Fitting Model B — standardized...\n")
fits_B_std <- fit_models(imputed_std_B, formula_B, "Model B std")
cat("✓ All models fitted\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART F: POOL COEFFICIENTS (RUBIN'S RULES)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART F: Pooling coefficients (Rubin's rules)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

pool_and_summarise <- function(fits_list, model_label) {
  valid_fits <- Filter(Negate(is.null), fits_list)
  if (length(valid_fits) == 0)
    stop(sprintf("%s: all imputations failed — cannot pool.", model_label))
  if (length(valid_fits) < length(fits_list))
    cat(sprintf("  ℹ️  %s: %d failed excluded from pooling\n",
                model_label, length(fits_list) - length(valid_fits)))

  mira_obj <- mice::as.mira(valid_fits)
  pooled   <- pool(mira_obj)

  smry <- summary(pooled, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(
      OR       = exp(estimate),
      OR_lower = exp(`2.5 %`),
      OR_upper = exp(`97.5 %`),
      OR_CI    = sprintf("%.2f [%.2f, %.2f]", OR, OR_lower, OR_upper),
      sig      = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
        p.value < 0.10  ~ ".",
        TRUE            ~ ""
      ),
      model = model_label
    ) %>%
    select(model, term, estimate, std.error, OR, OR_lower, OR_upper,
           OR_CI, statistic, p.value, sig)

  list(pooled = pooled, summary = smry)
}

results_A_raw <- pool_and_summarise(fits_A_raw, "Model A — Personality (raw)")
results_A_std <- pool_and_summarise(fits_A_std, "Model A — Personality (standardized)")
results_B_raw <- pool_and_summarise(fits_B_raw, "Model B — Full (raw)")
results_B_std <- pool_and_summarise(fits_B_std, "Model B — Full (standardized)")

# ── Print side-by-side for Model A ───────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL A — Personality\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("RAW SCORES (OR per 1-unit increase in original units):\n")
print(results_A_raw$summary %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, OR_CI, p.value, sig),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

cat("STANDARDIZED (OR per 1 SD increase; factors unchanged):\n")
print(results_A_std$summary %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, OR_CI, p.value, sig),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

cat("COMPARISON — Raw vs Standardized log-odds (Model A):\n")
comp_A <- results_A_raw$summary %>%
  select(term, b_raw = estimate, p_raw = p.value) %>%
  left_join(
    results_A_std$summary %>% select(term, b_std = estimate, p_std = p.value),
    by = "term"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    scale_change = round(abs(b_std) - abs(b_raw), 4),
    note = case_when(
      term == "(Intercept)"              ~ "intercept",
      !term %in% cont_A                 ~ "factor — unchanged",
      TRUE                              ~ sprintf("1 SD ≈ scaled")
    )
  )
print(comp_A, row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# ── Print side-by-side for Model B ───────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL B — Full\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("RAW SCORES (OR per 1-unit increase in original units):\n")
print(results_B_raw$summary %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, OR_CI, p.value, sig),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

cat("STANDARDIZED (OR per 1 SD increase; factors unchanged):\n")
print(results_B_std$summary %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, OR_CI, p.value, sig),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

cat("COMPARISON — Raw vs Standardized log-odds (Model B):\n")
comp_B <- results_B_raw$summary %>%
  select(term, b_raw = estimate, p_raw = p.value) %>%
  left_join(
    results_B_std$summary %>% select(term, b_std = estimate, p_std = p.value),
    by = "term"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    scale_change = round(abs(b_std) - abs(b_raw), 4),
    note = case_when(
      term == "(Intercept)"              ~ "intercept",
      !term %in% cont_B                 ~ "factor — unchanged",
      TRUE                              ~ sprintf("1 SD ≈ scaled")
    )
  )
print(comp_B, row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

cat("NOTE ON INTERPRETATION:\n")
cat("  Raw model:         OR reflects 1-unit change in original scale.\n")
cat("    Useful for clinical interpretation (e.g. 1 mg/day, 1 year, 1 point).\n")
cat("  Standardized model: OR reflects 1 SD change in continuous predictors.\n")
cat("    Useful for comparing effect sizes across variables with different scales.\n")
cat("    Factors are identical in both versions.\n")
cat("  AUC, DeLong's test, and diagnostics use RAW models (standardization\n")
cat("  does not affect predicted probabilities or model fit).\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART G: AUC WITH BOOTSTRAP CIs (raw models only — fit is identical)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART G: AUC per imputation (bootstrap CIs, B = 2000)\n")
cat("(Raw models used — standardization does not change fit)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

calc_auc_mi <- function(fits_list, data_list, label, boot.n = 2000) {
  mm     <- length(data_list)
  aucs   <- numeric(mm)
  lowers <- numeric(mm)
  uppers <- numeric(mm)

  for (i in seq_len(mm)) {
    if (is.null(fits_list[[i]])) {
      aucs[i] <- lowers[i] <- uppers[i] <- NA_real_
      next
    }
    pred_i <- predict(fits_list[[i]], type = "response")
    roc_i  <- roc(data_list[[i]][[outcome_var]], pred_i, quiet = TRUE)
    aucs[i] <- as.numeric(auc(roc_i))
    ci_i    <- ci.auc(roc_i, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = boot.n)
    lowers[i] <- ci_i[1]
    uppers[i] <- ci_i[3]
  }

  valid <- !is.na(aucs)
  cat(sprintf("%s AUC per imputation (valid n=%d):\n  %s\n",
              label, sum(valid),
              paste(sprintf("%.3f", aucs[valid]), collapse = ", ")))

  data.frame(
    model         = label,
    AUC_mean      = mean(aucs,   na.rm = TRUE),
    AUC_lower     = mean(lowers, na.rm = TRUE),
    AUC_upper     = mean(uppers, na.rm = TRUE),
    AUC_formatted = sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]",
                            mean(aucs,   na.rm = TRUE),
                            mean(lowers, na.rm = TRUE),
                            mean(uppers, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_valid = sum(valid)
  )
}

set.seed(42)
auc_A <- calc_auc_mi(fits_A_raw, imputed_list, "Model A (Personality)")
auc_B <- calc_auc_mi(fits_B_raw, imputed_list, "Model B (Full)")

cat("\n")
cat("AUC SUMMARY (mean ± mean bootstrap CI across imputations):\n")
cat(sprintf("  Model A (Personality): %s\n", auc_A$AUC_formatted))
cat(sprintf("  Model B (Full):        %s\n\n", auc_B$AUC_formatted))

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART H: DELONG'S TEST (POOLED — raw models)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART H: DeLong's test — pooled across imputations\n")
cat("Pooling ΔAUC directly via Rubin's rules (Li & Fine, 2010).\n")
cat("SE = |ΔAUC / z| from pROC roc.test() per imputation.\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

delong_results <- vector("list", m)

for (i in seq_len(m)) {
  if (is.null(fits_A_raw[[i]]) || is.null(fits_B_raw[[i]])) {
    delong_results[[i]] <- list(
      delta = NA_real_, var = NA_real_, z = NA_real_, p = NA_real_,
      auc_A = NA_real_, auc_B = NA_real_)
    next
  }

  pred_A_i  <- predict(fits_A_raw[[i]], type = "response")
  pred_B_i  <- predict(fits_B_raw[[i]], type = "response")
  outcome_i <- imputed_list[[i]][[outcome_var]]

  roc_A_i <- roc(outcome_i, pred_A_i, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_B_i <- roc(outcome_i, pred_B_i, quiet = TRUE)

  auc_A_i <- as.numeric(auc(roc_A_i))
  auc_B_i <- as.numeric(auc(roc_B_i))
  delta_i <- auc_B_i - auc_A_i

  test_i <- roc.test(roc_A_i, roc_B_i, method = "delong", paired = TRUE)
  z_i    <- as.numeric(test_i$statistic)
  se_i   <- if (abs(z_i) > 1e-8) abs(delta_i / z_i) else abs(delta_i) + 1e-8

  delong_results[[i]] <- list(
    delta = delta_i, var = se_i^2, z = z_i,
    p = test_i$p.value, auc_A = auc_A_i, auc_B = auc_B_i)

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Imputation %2d: AUC_A=%.3f  AUC_B=%.3f  Δ=%+.4f  SE=%.4f  z=%+.3f  p=%.4f\n",
    i, auc_A_i, auc_B_i, delta_i, se_i, z_i, test_i$p.value))
}

valid_idx <- which(sapply(delong_results, function(r) !is.na(r$delta)))
m_valid   <- length(valid_idx)

if (m_valid == 0) stop("DeLong: no valid imputations — cannot pool.")

delta_vec <- sapply(delong_results[valid_idx], `[[`, "delta")
var_vec   <- sapply(delong_results[valid_idx], `[[`, "var")

Q_bar  <- mean(delta_vec)
U_bar  <- mean(var_vec)
B      <- var(delta_vec)
T_var  <- U_bar + (1 + 1 / m_valid) * B
z_pool <- Q_bar / sqrt(T_var)
p_pool <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(z_pool))

r_L      <- (1 + 1 / m_valid) * B / U_bar
df_BR    <- if (is.finite(r_L) && r_L > 1e-10) (m_valid - 1) / r_L^2 else Inf
p_pool_t <- if (is.finite(df_BR)) 2 * pt(-abs(z_pool), df = df_BR) else p_pool
lambda   <- if (is.finite(r_L)) r_L / (r_L + 1) else NA_real_

cat(sprintf("\n  Variance decomposition:\n"))
cat(sprintf("    Within-imputation (U_bar): %.6f\n", U_bar))
cat(sprintf("    Between-imputation (B):    %.6f\n", B))
cat(sprintf("    Total (T):                 %.6f\n", T_var))
cat(sprintf("    Fraction missing info (λ): %.4f\n", lambda))

cat(sprintf("\n──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n"))
cat(sprintf("POOLED DELONG'S TEST (Rubin's rules on ΔAUC, m=%d)\n\n", m_valid))
cat(sprintf("  Pooled ΔAUC (B − A):        %+.4f\n", Q_bar))
cat(sprintf("  SE of pooled ΔAUC:          %.4f\n",  sqrt(T_var)))
cat(sprintf("  Pooled z-statistic:          %.4f\n",  z_pool))
cat(sprintf("  p-value (normal approx.):    %.4f%s\n", p_pool,
            ifelse(p_pool < 0.001, "  (< 0.001)",
            ifelse(p_pool < 0.05,  "  ← significant", ""))))
cat(sprintf("  p-value (t, df=%.1f):        %.4f\n",  df_BR, p_pool_t))

if (p_pool < 0.05) {
  winner <- ifelse(Q_bar > 0, "Model B (Full)", "Model A (Personality)")
  cat(sprintf("\n  ✓ Significant difference: %s has higher AUC.\n", winner))
} else {
  cat("\n  Models do not differ significantly in AUC (p ≥ 0.05).\n")
}
cat("──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART I: DIAGNOSTICS (VIF + INFLUENTIAL CASES — raw models, imputation 1)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART I: Diagnostics (imputation 1, raw models)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

run_diagnostics <- function(formula_obj, data, label) {
  cat(sprintf("%s\n", label))
  cat("──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

  fit <- glm(formula_obj, data = data, family = binomial())

  tryCatch({
    vif_vals <- vif(fit)
    if (is.matrix(vif_vals)) {
      vif_df <- data.frame(Variable = rownames(vif_vals),
                           VIF = round(vif_vals[, "GVIF^(1/(2*Df))"], 3))
    } else {
      vif_df <- data.frame(Variable = names(vif_vals),
                           VIF = round(as.numeric(vif_vals), 3))
    }
    vif_df  <- vif_df %>% arrange(desc(VIF))
    max_vif <- max(vif_df$VIF)
    cat("VIF (GVIF^(1/(2*Df)) for multi-level factors):\n")
    print(vif_df, row.names = FALSE)
    cat(sprintf("Max VIF: %.2f  %s\n\n", max_vif,
                ifelse(max_vif < 5, "(OK)", "⚠️  >5 — possible collinearity")))
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("VIF could not be computed: %s\n\n", e$message))
  })

  cooksd    <- cooks.distance(fit)
  threshold <- 4 / nrow(data)
  n_inf     <- sum(cooksd > threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("Cook's distance threshold: 4/n = %.5f\n", threshold))
  cat(sprintf("Influential cases (> threshold): %d (%.1f%%)\n\n",
              n_inf, 100 * n_inf / nrow(data)))

  invisible(fit)
}

run_diagnostics(formula_A, imputed_list[[1]], "MODEL A — Personality (raw)")
run_diagnostics(formula_B, imputed_list[[1]], "MODEL B — Full (raw)")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART J: PERFORMANCE SUMMARY TABLE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART J: Performance summary\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

performance <- data.frame(
  Model        = c("Model A", "Model B"),
  Description  = c("Personality VSURF interpretation set",
                   "Full VSURF interpretation set"),
  VSURF_Set    = c("Interpretation (Step 2)", "Interpretation (Step 2)"),
  N_Predictors = c(length(vars_A), length(vars_B)),
  EPV          = c(epv_A, epv_B),
  EPV_status   = c(epv_status(epv_A), epv_status(epv_B)),
  AUC          = c(auc_A$AUC_formatted, auc_B$AUC_formatted),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(performance, row.names = FALSE)
cat(sprintf(
  "\nDeLong's test: z=%.3f,  p=%.4f,  ΔAUC=%+.4f,  SE=%.4f\n\n",
  z_pool, p_pool, Q_bar, sqrt(T_var)))

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART K: SAVE RESULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART K: Saving results\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

all_summaries_raw <- bind_rows(results_A_raw$summary, results_B_raw$summary)
all_summaries_std <- bind_rows(results_A_std$summary, results_B_std$summary)

output <- list(

  variables = list(
    model_A      = vars_A,
    model_B      = vars_B,
    model_A_pred = vars_A_pred,
    model_B_pred = vars_B_pred,
    cont_A       = cont_A,
    cont_B       = cont_B
  ),

  summaries = list(
    # Raw
    model_A_raw = results_A_raw$summary,
    model_B_raw = results_B_raw$summary,
    all_raw     = all_summaries_raw,
    # Standardized
    model_A_std = results_A_std$summary,
    model_B_std = results_B_std$summary,
    all_std     = all_summaries_std,
    # Side-by-side comparisons
    comparison_A = comp_A,
    comparison_B = comp_B
  ),

  auc = list(model_A = auc_A, model_B = auc_B),

  delong = list(
    per_imputation = delong_results,
    pooled = data.frame(
      pooled_delta_AUC = Q_bar,
      SE_pooled        = sqrt(T_var),
      U_bar = U_bar, B = B, T_var = T_var,
      z_pooled = z_pool, p_normal = p_pool,
      p_t = p_pool_t, df_BR = df_BR,
      lambda_fmi = lambda, m_valid = m_valid
    )
  ),

  performance = performance,

  metadata = list(
    outcome           = outcome_var,
    outcome_coding    = "1=stopper (freq_dich 0 or 1), 0=continuer (freq_dich 2)",
    outcome_source    = "Chunk 9 Part B3 — used directly, not re-derived",
    vsurf_set_used    = "interpretation (Step 2) for both models",
    standardization   = "continuous predictors z-scored per imputation; factors unchanged",
    auc_delong_models = "raw models used (standardization does not affect fit)",
    bzra_dose_note    = "bzra_daily_dose_eq used (renamed from bzra_daily_diazepam_eq in Chunk 5+6)",
    n_events = n_events, n_stoppers = n_stoppers, n_continuers = n_continuers,
    N = N, m = m, epv_A = epv_A, epv_B = epv_B, boot_n = 2000, seed = 42
  )
)

saveRDS(output,                   "regression_comparison_results.rds")
write_csv(all_summaries_raw,      "regression_coefficients_raw.csv")
write_csv(all_summaries_std,      "regression_coefficients_standardized.csv")
write_csv(comp_A,                 "regression_comparison_A_raw_vs_std.csv")
write_csv(comp_B,                 "regression_comparison_B_raw_vs_std.csv")
write_csv(performance,            "regression_model_performance.csv")
write_csv(output$delong$pooled,   "delong_pooled_results.csv")

cat("✓ Saved: regression_comparison_results.rds\n")
cat("✓ Saved: regression_coefficients_raw.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: regression_coefficients_standardized.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: regression_comparison_A_raw_vs_std.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: regression_comparison_B_raw_vs_std.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: regression_model_performance.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: delong_pooled_results.csv\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SUMMARY
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 12 COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat(sprintf("Outcome: %s  |  Stoppers: %d  |  Continuers: %d\n\n",
            outcome_var, n_stoppers, n_continuers))

cat("VSURF sets used: Interpretation (Step 2) — both models\n\n")

cat(sprintf("Model A (Personality): %d predictors, EPV=%.1f, AUC=%s\n",
            length(vars_A), epv_A, auc_A$AUC_formatted))
cat(sprintf("Model B (Full):        %d predictors, EPV=%.1f, AUC=%s\n",
            length(vars_B), epv_B, auc_B$AUC_formatted))
cat(sprintf("DeLong's test:         z=%.3f, p=%.4f, ΔAUC=%+.4f, SE=%.4f\n\n",
            z_pool, p_pool, Q_bar, sqrt(T_var)))

cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  1. regression_comparison_results.rds     (all results)\n")
cat("  2. regression_coefficients_raw.csv       (raw OR tables)\n")
cat("  3. regression_coefficients_standardized.csv (std OR tables)\n")
cat("  4. regression_comparison_A_raw_vs_std.csv   (Model A side-by-side)\n")
cat("  5. regression_comparison_B_raw_vs_std.csv   (Model B side-by-side)\n")
cat("  6. regression_model_performance.csv\n")
cat("  7. delong_pooled_results.csv\n\n")

cat("NOTES:\n")
cat("  - Both models use VSURF interpretation set (Step 2)\n")
cat("  - Raw model:          OR = change per 1 unit in original scale\n")
cat("  - Standardized model: OR = change per 1 SD; factors unchanged\n")
cat("  - AUC and DeLong use raw models (fit is identical to standardized)\n")
cat("  - bzra_daily_dose_eq used (renamed in Chunk 5+6; no remapping needed)\n")
cat("  - stop_wdl_exp_combined: 3-level unordered factor\n")
cat("  - DeLong pooling: Rubin's rules on ΔAUC (not z-statistics)\n")
cat("  - AUC CIs: mean bootstrap CIs across imputations\n")
cat("  - mice::as.mira() used; NULL (failed) imputations excluded\n\n")

cat("REFERENCES:\n")
cat("  DeLong et al. (1988). Biometrics, 44:837–845.\n")
cat("  Li & Fine (2010). Biostatistics.\n")
cat("  Rubin, D.B. (1987). Multiple Imputation for Nonresponse in Surveys.\n")
cat("  Barnard & Rubin (1999). Biometrika, 86:948–955.\n\n")

cat("✓ Ready for Chunk 13: reporting / visualisation\n\n")
```





## Cross-Validation
```{r}
#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 13: 10-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION — PERSONALITY vs FULL MODEL
#==============================================================================
# Purpose:
#   Internal validation of both logistic regression models from Chunk 12
#   using 10-fold cross-validation across all 24 imputations.
#
# Models:
#   Model A — Personality VSURF interpretation set (Chunk 11A)
#   Model B — Full VSURF interpretation set (Chunk 11B)
#   Both models use the interpretation set (Step 2), consistent with Chunk 12.
#
# Method:
#   CV performed independently on each imputation; results pooled by
#   averaging across imputations (consistent with AUC pooling in Chunk 12).
#   Bootstrap CIs (B = 2000) on the overall out-of-fold AUC per imputation.
#
# Coefficients:
#   Raw-score models used throughout (consistent with Chunk 12 raw models).
#   Apparent AUC loaded directly from regression_comparison_results.rds
#   (Chunk 12 raw models). This guarantees exact alignment with the reported
#   Chunk 12 AUCs — no model refitting, no resampling drift.
#
# Optimism:
#   Computed as apparent AUC − CV AUC, averaged across imputations.
#   Reflects overfitting to the training data.
#
# References:
#   Steyerberg EW (2009). Clinical Prediction Models. Springer.
#   Rubin DB (1987). Multiple Imputation for Nonresponse in Surveys.
#==============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(pROC)

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 13: 10-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION\n")
cat("Model A (Personality) vs Model B (Full)\n")
cat("Both models use VSURF interpretation set (Step 2)\n")
cat("Raw-score models used (consistent with Chunk 12)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART A: LOAD DATA AND RESULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("PART A: Loading data and Chunk 12 results\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

if (!file.exists("imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds"))
  stop("ERROR: imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds not found. Run Chunk 9 first.")

imputed_list <- readRDS("imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds")
m            <- length(imputed_list)
N            <- nrow(imputed_list[[1]])

cat(sprintf("✓ Loaded imputed_datasets_complete_final.rds\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Imputations: %d  |  N: %d\n\n", m, N))

if (m != 24)
  warning(sprintf("Expected 24 imputations but found %d.", m))

if (!file.exists("regression_comparison_results.rds"))
  stop("ERROR: regression_comparison_results.rds not found. Run Chunk 12 first.")

chunk12     <- readRDS("regression_comparison_results.rds")
vars_A      <- chunk12$variables$model_A
vars_B      <- chunk12$variables$model_B
outcome_var <- chunk12$metadata$outcome

if (!is.null(chunk12$metadata$m) && chunk12$metadata$m != m)
  warning(sprintf(
    "⚠️  Chunk 12 was run on m=%d imputations but %d loaded now — results may not align.",
    chunk12$metadata$m, m))

if (!is.null(chunk12$metadata$N) && chunk12$metadata$N != N)
  stop(sprintf(
    "Chunk 12 N=%d but loaded data has N=%d — datasets do not match.",
    chunk12$metadata$N, N))

if (!outcome_var %in% names(imputed_list[[1]]))
  stop(sprintf("ERROR: outcome '%s' not found in imputed data.", outcome_var))

# ── Apparent AUC from Chunk 12 raw models (loaded directly — no refitting) ────
# Per-imputation apparent AUCs stored in delong results (auc_A / auc_B fields).
# These are from the raw-score models in Chunk 12 — standardization does not
# affect predicted probabilities so raw and standardized AUCs are identical,
# but raw is used here for explicit consistency.
apparent_aucs_A <- sapply(chunk12$delong$per_imputation, `[[`, "auc_A")
apparent_aucs_B <- sapply(chunk12$delong$per_imputation, `[[`, "auc_B")

if (any(is.na(apparent_aucs_A)) || any(is.na(apparent_aucs_B))) {
  n_na <- sum(is.na(apparent_aucs_A) | is.na(apparent_aucs_B))
  warning(sprintf("⚠️  %d imputation(s) have NA apparent AUC from Chunk 12.", n_na))
}

apparent_auc_A   <- chunk12$auc$model_A$AUC_mean
apparent_lower_A <- chunk12$auc$model_A$AUC_lower
apparent_upper_A <- chunk12$auc$model_A$AUC_upper

apparent_auc_B   <- chunk12$auc$model_B$AUC_mean
apparent_lower_B <- chunk12$auc$model_B$AUC_lower
apparent_upper_B <- chunk12$auc$model_B$AUC_upper

cat(sprintf("Outcome: %s\n\n", outcome_var))

cat(sprintf("Model A — Personality VSURF interpretation set (%d variables):\n",
            length(vars_A)))
for (v in vars_A) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("Model B — Full VSURF interpretation set (%d variables):\n",
            length(vars_B)))
for (v in vars_B) cat(sprintf("  • %s\n", v))
cat("\n")

cat("Apparent AUC (raw models, loaded from Chunk 12 — no refitting):\n")
cat(sprintf("  Model A: %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
            apparent_auc_A, apparent_lower_A, apparent_upper_A))
cat(sprintf("  Model B: %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n\n",
            apparent_auc_B, apparent_lower_B, apparent_upper_B))

formula_A <- as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(vars_A, collapse = " + ")))
formula_B <- as.formula(paste(outcome_var, "~", paste(vars_B, collapse = " + ")))

boot.n  <- 2000
n_folds <- 10

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART B: CV FUNCTION
#
# Raw-score models used throughout — predictors are on their original scales,
# consistent with the raw models from Chunk 12.
#
# Seed strategy:
#   fold assignment : set.seed(seed)          — controls fold splits
#   bootstrap CI    : set.seed(seed + 10000)  — offset to avoid overlap
#
# Unseen factor levels:
#   With sparse categorical predictors (e.g. stop_wdl_exp_combined),
#   a test fold may contain levels absent from the training fold, causing
#   predict.glm() to error with "factor has new levels".
#   Handling: unseen-level rows are assigned the training-set base rate
#   (mean outcome in training). This is conservative and honest about
#   the limitation. A count of affected rows is tracked and reported.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

get_factor_vars <- function(data, formula_obj) {
  pred_vars <- all.vars(formula_obj)[-1]
  pred_vars[sapply(pred_vars, function(v) v %in% names(data) && is.factor(data[[v]]))]
}

align_test_factors <- function(train_data, test_data, factor_vars) {
  n_affected <- 0L
  for (v in factor_vars) {
    train_levels <- levels(droplevels(train_data[[v]]))
    unseen_rows  <- !as.character(test_data[[v]]) %in% train_levels
    if (any(unseen_rows)) {
      test_data[[v]][unseen_rows] <- NA
      n_affected <- n_affected + sum(unseen_rows)
    }
  }
  list(test_data = test_data, n_affected = n_affected)
}

cv_one_imputation <- function(data, formula_obj, outcome_var,
                               n_folds = 10, seed = 123, boot.n = 2000) {

  set.seed(seed)
  n        <- nrow(data)
  fold_ids <- sample(rep(seq_len(n_folds), length.out = n))

  all_preds      <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  all_obs        <- numeric(n)
  fold_aucs      <- numeric(n_folds)
  factor_vars    <- get_factor_vars(data, formula_obj)
  total_affected <- 0L

  for (k in seq_len(n_folds)) {
    train_data <- data[fold_ids != k, ]
    test_data  <- data[fold_ids == k, ]
    base_rate  <- mean(train_data[[outcome_var]], na.rm = TRUE)

    model_k <- tryCatch(
      glm(formula_obj, data = train_data, family = binomial()),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(model_k)) {
      fold_aucs[k] <- NA_real_
      all_obs[fold_ids == k]   <- test_data[[outcome_var]]
      all_preds[fold_ids == k] <- base_rate
      next
    }

    aligned        <- align_test_factors(train_data, test_data, factor_vars)
    test_data_a    <- aligned$test_data
    total_affected <- total_affected + aligned$n_affected

    pred_k_raw <- tryCatch(
      predict(model_k, newdata = test_data_a, type = "response",
              na.action = na.pass),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_data_a))
    )

    pred_k            <- as.numeric(pred_k_raw)
    pred_k[is.na(pred_k)] <- base_rate

    all_preds[fold_ids == k] <- pred_k
    all_obs[fold_ids == k]   <- test_data[[outcome_var]]

    roc_k        <- roc(test_data[[outcome_var]], pred_k, quiet = TRUE)
    fold_aucs[k] <- as.numeric(auc(roc_k))
  }

  if (total_affected > 0)
    message(sprintf(
      "    [seed=%d] %d test-fold row(s) had unseen factor levels — assigned base rate",
      seed, total_affected))

  roc_overall <- roc(all_obs, all_preds, quiet = TRUE)
  overall_auc <- as.numeric(auc(roc_overall))

  set.seed(seed + 10000)
  ci_overall <- ci.auc(roc_overall, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = boot.n)

  list(
    overall_auc   = overall_auc,
    cv_lower      = as.numeric(ci_overall[1]),
    cv_upper      = as.numeric(ci_overall[3]),
    fold_aucs     = fold_aucs,
    mean_fold_auc = mean(fold_aucs, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_fold_auc   = sd(fold_aucs,   na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART C: RUN CV FOR BOTH MODELS ACROSS ALL IMPUTATIONS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat(sprintf("PART C: Running %d-fold CV across %d imputations\n", n_folds, m))
cat("Raw-score predictors used (original scale, consistent with Chunk 12)\n")
cat("(expect several minutes)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

run_cv_all_imputations <- function(imputed_list, formula_obj, outcome_var,
                                    label, n_folds = 10, boot.n = 2000) {
  mm      <- length(imputed_list)
  results <- vector("list", mm)

  cat(sprintf("Running CV for %s...\n", label))
  for (i in seq_len(mm)) {
    cat(sprintf("  Imputation %2d / %d\r", i, mm))
    results[[i]] <- cv_one_imputation(
      data        = imputed_list[[i]],
      formula_obj = formula_obj,
      outcome_var = outcome_var,
      n_folds     = n_folds,
      seed        = 123 + i,
      boot.n      = boot.n
    )
  }
  cat(sprintf("✓ %s CV complete (%d imputations)         \n\n", label, mm))
  results
}

cv_results_A <- run_cv_all_imputations(
  imputed_list, formula_A, outcome_var, "Model A (Personality)")

cv_results_B <- run_cv_all_imputations(
  imputed_list, formula_B, outcome_var, "Model B (Full)")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART D: POOL CV RESULTS
#
# Per-imputation optimism = apparent_AUC_i − CV_AUC_i, where apparent_AUC_i
# is taken from Chunk 12 raw model DeLong results (exact match, no refitting).
# Pooled optimism = mean of per-imputation optimism values.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART D: Pooled CV results\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

pool_cv <- function(cv_results_list, apparent_aucs_per_imp,
                    apparent_mean, apparent_lower, apparent_upper, label) {

  mm        <- length(cv_results_list)
  cv_aucs   <- sapply(cv_results_list, `[[`, "overall_auc")
  cv_lowers <- sapply(cv_results_list, `[[`, "cv_lower")
  cv_uppers <- sapply(cv_results_list, `[[`, "cv_upper")

  optimism_per_imp <- apparent_aucs_per_imp - cv_aucs

  cv_mean      <- mean(cv_aucs,          na.rm = TRUE)
  cv_lower_out <- mean(cv_lowers,        na.rm = TRUE)
  cv_upper_out <- mean(cv_uppers,        na.rm = TRUE)
  optimism     <- mean(optimism_per_imp, na.rm = TRUE)

  cat(sprintf("%s\n", label))
  cat("──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat(sprintf("  Apparent AUC (Chunk 12 raw):  %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
              apparent_mean, apparent_lower, apparent_upper))
  cat(sprintf("  CV AUC (mean ± mean CI):      %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
              cv_mean, cv_lower_out, cv_upper_out))
  cat(sprintf("  Optimism (mean):              %.3f\n", optimism))
  cat(sprintf("  CV AUC range:                 %.4f – %.4f\n",
              min(cv_aucs, na.rm = TRUE), max(cv_aucs, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  CV AUC SD:                    %.4f\n", sd(cv_aucs, na.rm = TRUE)))

  interp <- if (optimism < 0.02) {
    "Minimal (<0.02) — excellent generalisability"
  } else if (optimism < 0.05) {
    "Moderate (0.02–0.05) — acceptable generalisability"
  } else {
    "Substantial (>0.05) — evidence of overfitting"
  }
  cat(sprintf("  Optimism interpretation:      %s\n\n", interp))

  list(
    cv_mean          = cv_mean,
    cv_lower         = cv_lower_out,
    cv_upper         = cv_upper_out,
    cv_aucs          = cv_aucs,
    cv_lowers        = cv_lowers,
    cv_uppers        = cv_uppers,
    optimism         = optimism,
    optimism_per_imp = optimism_per_imp,
    interp           = interp
  )
}

pooled_A <- pool_cv(
  cv_results_A, apparent_aucs_A,
  apparent_auc_A, apparent_lower_A, apparent_upper_A,
  "MODEL A — Personality (interpretation set, raw scores)")

pooled_B <- pool_cv(
  cv_results_B, apparent_aucs_B,
  apparent_auc_B, apparent_lower_B, apparent_upper_B,
  "MODEL B — Full (interpretation set, raw scores)")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART E: FOLD-LEVEL STABILITY
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART E: Fold-level stability\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

fold_stability <- function(cv_results_list, label) {

  fold_df <- tibble(
    Fold     = seq_len(n_folds),
    Mean_AUC = sapply(seq_len(n_folds), function(k)
      mean(sapply(cv_results_list, function(x) x$fold_aucs[k]), na.rm = TRUE)),
    SD_AUC   = sapply(seq_len(n_folds), function(k)
      sd(sapply(cv_results_list, function(x) x$fold_aucs[k]), na.rm = TRUE))
  )

  cat(sprintf("%s — fold AUC (averaged across %d imputations):\n",
              label, length(cv_results_list)))
  cat("──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  print(fold_df, n = Inf)
  cat(sprintf("\n  Mean: %.3f  |  SD: %.3f  |  Range: %.3f – %.3f\n\n",
              mean(fold_df$Mean_AUC), sd(fold_df$Mean_AUC),
              min(fold_df$Mean_AUC), max(fold_df$Mean_AUC)))

  fold_df
}

fold_A <- fold_stability(cv_results_A, "MODEL A — Personality")
fold_B <- fold_stability(cv_results_B, "MODEL B — Full")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART F: PER-IMPUTATION SUMMARY TABLE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART F: Per-imputation CV summary\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cv_by_imputation <- tibble(
  Imputation = seq_len(m),
  A_Apparent = apparent_aucs_A,
  A_CV       = pooled_A$cv_aucs,
  A_CV_Lower = pooled_A$cv_lowers,
  A_CV_Upper = pooled_A$cv_uppers,
  A_Optimism = pooled_A$optimism_per_imp,
  B_Apparent = apparent_aucs_B,
  B_CV       = pooled_B$cv_aucs,
  B_CV_Lower = pooled_B$cv_lowers,
  B_CV_Upper = pooled_B$cv_uppers,
  B_Optimism = pooled_B$optimism_per_imp
)

cat("Per-imputation AUC (apparent from Chunk 12 raw models, CV from this chunk):\n\n")
print(cv_by_imputation %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))),
      n = Inf)
cat("\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART G: OVERALL SUMMARY TABLE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART G: Summary\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

summary_table <- data.frame(
  Model        = c("Model A (Personality)", "Model B (Full)"),
  VSURF_Set    = c("Interpretation (Step 2)", "Interpretation (Step 2)"),
  Scores       = c("Raw", "Raw"),
  N_Predictors = c(length(vars_A), length(vars_B)),
  Apparent_AUC = c(
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", apparent_auc_A, apparent_lower_A, apparent_upper_A),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", apparent_auc_B, apparent_lower_B, apparent_upper_B)),
  CV_AUC = c(
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", pooled_A$cv_mean, pooled_A$cv_lower, pooled_A$cv_upper),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", pooled_B$cv_mean, pooled_B$cv_lower, pooled_B$cv_upper)),
  Optimism       = c(round(pooled_A$optimism, 3), round(pooled_B$optimism, 3)),
  Interpretation = c(pooled_A$interp, pooled_B$interp),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(summary_table, row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART H: SAVE RESULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART H: Saving results\n")
```
