```{r}
  if (t1 == "multi_nominal"  && t2 == "multi_nominal")   return(assoc_cramerv(x, y))
  # Fallback
  list(value = NA_real_, symbol = "?", signed = TRUE)
}

cat("✓ Association functions defined\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# PART F: COMPUTE ASSOCIATION MATRICES
# ==============================================================================

cat("PART F: Computing pairwise association matrices\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

vnames <- names(work_data)
nv     <- length(vnames)

val_mat <- matrix(NA_real_,      nv, nv, dimnames = list(vnames, vnames))
sym_mat <- matrix(NA_character_, nv, nv, dimnames = list(vnames, vnames))
sgn_mat <- matrix(TRUE,          nv, nv, dimnames = list(vnames, vnames))

diag(val_mat) <- 1
diag(sym_mat) <- "ρ"

cat(sprintf("Variables in matrix: %d\n", nv))
cat(sprintf("Pairs to compute:    %d\n\n", nv * (nv - 1) / 2))

pb_step <- max(1, floor(nv / 10))
for (i in seq_len(nv)) {
  if (i %% pb_step == 0)
    cat(sprintf("  ... %d / %d rows processed\n", i, nv))
  for (j in seq_len(i - 1)) {
    res <- pair_assoc(vnames[i], vnames[j], work_data, var_types)
    val_mat[i, j] <- res$value;  val_mat[j, i] <- res$value
    sym_mat[i, j] <- res$symbol; sym_mat[j, i] <- res$symbol
    sgn_mat[i, j] <- res$signed; sgn_mat[j, i] <- res$signed
  }
}

cat("\n✓ Association matrix complete\n\n")

method_counts <- table(sym_mat[lower.tri(sym_mat)])
cat("Methods used (lower triangle):\n")
for (nm in names(method_counts))
  cat(sprintf("  %-3s  %d pairs\n", nm, method_counts[nm]))
cat("\n")

# ── Cell label matrix: ".45ρ" style ───────────────────────────────────────────
label_mat <- matrix("", nv, nv, dimnames = list(vnames, vnames))
for (i in seq_len(nv)) {
  for (j in seq_len(i - 1)) {
    v <- val_mat[i, j]; s <- sym_mat[i, j]
    if (!is.na(v)) label_mat[i, j] <- paste0(sprintf("%.2f", v), s)
  }
}
diag(label_mat) <- "1"

# ==============================================================================
# PART G: BUILD LONG-FORMAT PLOT DATA
# ==============================================================================

cat("PART G: Building plot data\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

model_vars_in_mat <- model_vars[model_vars %in% vnames]
is_model_var      <- vnames %in% model_vars_in_mat
label_colours     <- setNames(ifelse(is_model_var, "#C0392B", "grey20"), vnames)

cat(sprintf("Model vars in matrix: %d / %d\n\n",
            sum(is_model_var), length(model_vars)))

# Long format for ggplot (lower triangle + diagonal only)
build_plot_df <- function(v_mat, sym_mat, sgn_mat, lbl_mat, var_names) {
  nv <- length(var_names)
  out <- expand.grid(j = seq_len(nv), i = seq_len(nv),
                     KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  out <- out[out$i >= out$j, ]   # lower triangle + diagonal
  out$x      <- factor(var_names[out$j], levels = var_names)
  out$y      <- factor(var_names[out$i], levels = rev(var_names))
  out$value  <- v_mat[cbind(out$i, out$j)]
  out$symbol <- sym_mat[cbind(out$i, out$j)]
  out$signed <- sgn_mat[cbind(out$i, out$j)]
  out$label  <- lbl_mat[cbind(out$i, out$j)]
  out
}

plot_df          <- build_plot_df(val_mat, sym_mat, sgn_mat, label_mat, vnames)
plot_df_signed   <- plot_df %>% filter(signed  | (as.integer(x) == as.integer(y)))
plot_df_unsigned <- plot_df %>% filter(!signed & (as.integer(x) != as.integer(y)))

# ==============================================================================
# PART H: STATIC PLOTS
# ==============================================================================

cat("PART H: Generating static plots\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

n_vars   <- nv
lab_size <- ifelse(n_vars > 60, 1.0, ifelse(n_vars > 30, 1.5, 2.2))
tl_size  <- ifelse(n_vars > 60, 4.0, ifelse(n_vars > 30, 5.5, 7.5))
canvas   <- ifelse(n_vars > 60, 34,  ifelse(n_vars > 30, 26,  18))

# Axis label colours — must align with factor levels
x_colours <- label_colours[levels(plot_df$x)]
y_colours  <- rev(label_colours[levels(plot_df$y)])

make_assoc_plot <- function(df_signed, df_unsigned, has_ggnewscale,
                            title_str, subtitle_str,
                            lab_size, tl_size, x_colours, y_colours) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    # Signed tiles: diverging red–white–blue
    geom_tile(data = df_signed,
              aes(x = x, y = y, fill = value),
              colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      name     = "Signed\n(ρ / r / φ)",
      low      = "#B2182B", mid = "white", high = "#2166AC",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1), na.value = "grey93",
      guide    = guide_colorbar(order = 1,
                                barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
                                barwidth  = unit(0.4, "cm"))
    )

  if (has_ggnewscale) {
    p <- p +
      ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
      # Unsigned tiles: sequential white–purple
      geom_tile(data = df_unsigned,
                aes(x = x, y = y, fill = value),
                colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
      scale_fill_gradient(
        name   = "Unsigned\n(η / V)",
        low    = "white", high = "#762A83",
        limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "grey93",
        guide  = guide_colorbar(order = 2,
                                barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
                                barwidth  = unit(0.4, "cm"))
      )
  } else {
    # Fallback without ggnewscale: shade unsigned cells grey
    p <- p +
      geom_tile(data = df_unsigned,
                aes(x = x, y = y),
                fill = "grey78", colour = "white", linewidth = 0.25)
    subtitle_str <- paste0(subtitle_str,
                           "\n[Install ggnewscale for purple unsigned scale]")
  }

  p +
    geom_text(data = df_signed   %>% filter(label != ""),
              aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
              size = lab_size, colour = "grey10") +
    geom_text(data = df_unsigned %>% filter(label != ""),
              aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
              size = lab_size, colour = "grey10") +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "bottom") +
    labs(title = title_str, subtitle = subtitle_str, x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      plot.title        = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle     = element_text(size = 7.5, colour = "grey40"),
      axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,
                                       size = tl_size, colour = x_colours),
      axis.text.y       = element_text(size = tl_size, colour = y_colours),
      panel.grid        = element_blank(),
      legend.position   = "right",
      legend.title      = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.text       = element_text(size = 7),
      plot.margin       = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
    )
}

# ── H1. Full matrix ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_full <- make_assoc_plot(
  df_signed      = plot_df_signed,
  df_unsigned    = plot_df_unsigned,
  has_ggnewscale = has_ggnewscale,
  title_str      = "Mixed-Measure Association Matrix — SIMOA (Complete Cases)",
  subtitle_str   = sprintf(
    "ρ=Spearman | r=rank-biserial | φ=phi | η=eta² | V=Cramér's V  |  CC n=%d  |  red labels=model vars",
    nrow(cc_data)
  ),
  lab_size    = lab_size,
  tl_size     = tl_size,
  x_colours   = x_colours,
  y_colours   = y_colours
)

ggsave("cc_correlation_matrix.png", plot = p_full,
       width = canvas, height = canvas * 0.95, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("cc_correlation_matrix.pdf", plot = p_full,
       width = canvas, height = canvas * 0.95)
cat("✓ Saved: cc_correlation_matrix.png\n")
cat("✓ Saved: cc_correlation_matrix.pdf\n\n")

# ── H2. Model vars only ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
mv_names  <- vnames[is_model_var]
mv_idx    <- which(is_model_var)

val_m  <- val_mat[mv_idx, mv_idx]
sym_m  <- sym_mat[mv_idx, mv_idx]
sgn_m  <- sgn_mat[mv_idx, mv_idx]
lbl_m  <- label_mat[mv_idx, mv_idx]

df_m         <- build_plot_df(val_m, sym_m, sgn_m, lbl_m, mv_names)
df_m_signed  <- df_m %>% filter(signed  | (as.integer(x) == as.integer(y)))
df_m_unsign  <- df_m %>% filter(!signed & (as.integer(x) != as.integer(y)))

n_m   <- length(mv_names)
ls_m  <- ifelse(n_m > 15, 2.2, 3.0)
tc_m  <- ifelse(n_m > 15, 7,   9)
cv_m  <- ifelse(n_m > 15, 16,  12)

xc_m  <- label_colours[mv_names]
yc_m  <- rev(label_colours[mv_names])

p_model <- make_assoc_plot(
  df_signed      = df_m_signed,
  df_unsigned    = df_m_unsign,
  has_ggnewscale = has_ggnewscale,
  title_str      = "Model Predictor Association Matrix — SIMOA (Complete Cases)",
  subtitle_str   = sprintf(
    "ρ=Spearman | r=rank-biserial | φ=phi | η=eta² | V=Cramér's V  |  CC n=%d",
    nrow(cc_data)
  ),
  lab_size    = ls_m,
  tl_size     = tc_m,
  x_colours   = xc_m,
  y_colours   = yc_m
)

ggsave("cc_correlation_matrix_model_only.png", plot = p_model,
       width = cv_m, height = cv_m * 0.95, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("✓ Saved: cc_correlation_matrix_model_only.png\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# PART I: INTERACTIVE HTML
# ==============================================================================

cat("PART I: Generating interactive HTML\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

# Lower-triangle matrices: separate signed vs unsigned
val_lower <- val_mat; val_lower[upper.tri(val_lower)] <- NA

signed_lower   <- val_lower
unsigned_lower <- val_lower

for (i in seq_len(nv)) {
  for (j in seq_len(i - 1)) {
    if (!sgn_mat[i, j]) signed_lower[i, j]   <- NA
    if ( sgn_mat[i, j]) unsigned_lower[i, j] <- NA
  }
}
unsigned_lower[cbind(seq_len(nv), seq_len(nv))] <- NA  # diagonal → signed only

# Tick labels: append ★ for model vars
tick_labels <- ifelse(vnames %in% model_vars_in_mat,
                      paste0(vnames, " ★"), vnames)

method_desc <- c(
  "ρ" = "Spearman ρ: rank correlation (signed, −1 to +1)",
  "r" = "Rank-biserial r: binary vs continuous (signed, −1 to +1; +ve = group 1 ranks higher)",
  "φ" = "Phi φ: binary vs binary (signed, −1 to +1; +ve = co-occurrence of 1s > chance)",
  "η" = "Eta² η: nominal vs continuous (unsigned, 0–1; direction needs group descriptives)",
  "V" = "Cramér's V: nominal vs nominal (unsigned, 0–1)"
)

hover_text <- outer(
  seq_along(vnames), seq_along(vnames),
  FUN = Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    if (j > i) return("")
    v   <- val_mat[i, j]
    s   <- if (!is.na(sym_mat[i, j])) sym_mat[i, j] else "?"
    ti  <- if (vnames[i] %in% model_vars_in_mat) " ★" else ""
    tj  <- if (vnames[j] %in% model_vars_in_mat) " ★" else ""
    vstr <- if (is.na(v)) "NA" else sprintf("%.3f", v)
    desc <- if (s %in% names(method_desc)) method_desc[s] else ""
    sprintf("<b>%s%s</b> × <b>%s%s</b><br>%s = %s<br><i>%s</i><br><i>CC n = %d</i>",
            vnames[i], ti, vnames[j], tj, s, vstr, desc, nrow(cc_data))
  })
)

p_html <- plot_ly() %>%
  add_trace(
    type       = "heatmap",
    z          = signed_lower,
    x          = tick_labels, y = tick_labels,
    colorscale = list(c(0,"#B2182B"), c(0.5,"#FFFFFF"), c(1,"#2166AC")),
    zmin = -1, zmax = 1,
    text = hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
    showscale = TRUE,
    colorbar  = list(
      title    = "ρ / r / φ",
      len = 0.42, y = 0.76,
      tickvals = c(-1,-0.5,0,0.5,1),
      ticktext = c("-1.0","-0.5","0","+0.5","+1.0"),
      titlefont = list(size = 11), tickfont = list(size = 10)
    ),
    name = "Signed (ρ / r / φ)"
  ) %>%
  add_trace(
    type       = "heatmap",
    z          = unsigned_lower,
    x          = tick_labels, y = tick_labels,
    colorscale = list(c(0,"#FFFFFF"), c(1,"#762A83")),
    zmin = 0, zmax = 1,
    text = hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
    showscale = TRUE,
    colorbar  = list(
      title    = "η / V",
      len = 0.42, y = 0.26,
      tickvals = c(0,0.25,0.5,0.75,1),
      ticktext = c("0",".25",".50",".75","1.0"),
      titlefont = list(size = 11), tickfont = list(size = 10)
    ),
    name = "Unsigned (η / V)"
  ) %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = paste0(
        "Mixed-Measure Association Matrix — SIMOA (Complete Cases)<br>",
        sprintf(
          "<sup>ρ=Spearman | r=rank-biserial | φ=phi | η=eta² | V=Cramér's V | CC n=%d | ★=model var | hover for detail</sup>",
          nrow(cc_data)
        )
      ),
      font = list(size = 14)
    ),
    xaxis  = list(tickfont = list(size = 7), tickangle = -55, automargin = TRUE),
    yaxis  = list(tickfont = list(size = 7), automargin = TRUE, autorange = "reversed"),
    margin = list(l = 170, b = 170, t = 110, r = 130),
    width  = 1450, height = 1350
  )

saveWidget(p_html, file = "cc_correlation_matrix.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
cat("✓ Saved: cc_correlation_matrix.html\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# PART J: SAVE ASSOCIATION MATRICES AS CSV
# ==============================================================================

cat("PART J: Saving association matrices as CSV\n")
cat("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

# Value matrix (lower triangle only — upper set to NA for clarity)
val_export           <- val_mat
val_export[upper.tri(val_export)] <- NA
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(val_export),
  "cc_association_matrix_values.csv",
  na = ""
)

# Symbol matrix (lower triangle only)
sym_export           <- sym_mat
sym_export[upper.tri(sym_export)] <- NA
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(sym_export),
  "cc_association_matrix_symbols.csv",
  na = ""
)

cat("✓ Saved: cc_association_matrix_values.csv\n")
cat("✓ Saved: cc_association_matrix_symbols.csv\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# SUMMARY
# ==============================================================================

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("CHUNK 16 COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat(sprintf("Complete case n:           %d\n",   nrow(cc_data)))
cat(sprintf("Matrix dimensions:         %d × %d\n", nv, nv))
cat(sprintf("Model vars highlighted:    %d\n\n", sum(is_model_var)))

cat("Variable types:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Continuous/ordinal:      %d\n", n_cont))
cat(sprintf("  Binary nominal:          %d\n", n_binom))
cat(sprintf("  Multi-category nominal:  %d\n\n", n_multi))

cat("Methods used (lower triangle):\n")
for (nm in names(method_counts))
  cat(sprintf("  %-3s  %d pairs\n", nm, method_counts[nm]))
cat("\n")

cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  1. cc_correlation_matrix.png             — full matrix, static\n")
cat("  2. cc_correlation_matrix.pdf             — vector version\n")
cat("  3. cc_correlation_matrix.html            — interactive, dual colour bars\n")
cat("  4. cc_correlation_matrix_model_only.png  — model vars only\n")
cat("  5. cc_association_matrix_values.csv      — numeric values (lower triangle)\n")
cat("  6. cc_association_matrix_symbols.csv     — method symbols (lower triangle)\n\n")

cat("COLOUR SCALE KEY:\n")
cat("  Red–White–Blue (diverging):   ρ, r, φ  — signed, −1 to +1\n")
cat("  White–Purple   (sequential):  η, V     — unsigned, 0 to +1\n\n")

cat("SYMBOL KEY:\n")
cat("  ρ  Spearman rank correlation\n")
cat("     Continuous/ordinal × continuous/ordinal\n\n")
cat("  r  Rank-biserial correlation  (SIGNED — direction preserved)\n")
cat("     Binary × continuous/ordinal\n")
cat("     Positive = group coded 1 tends to rank higher\n\n")
cat("  φ  Phi coefficient            (SIGNED — direction preserved)\n")
cat("     Binary × binary\n")
cat("     Positive = co-occurrence of 1s exceeds chance\n\n")
cat("  η  Eta squared (KW-based)     (UNSIGNED)\n")
cat("     Multi-category nominal × continuous/ordinal\n")
cat("     Ranges 0–1; use group descriptives to recover direction\n\n")
cat("  V  Cramér's V                 (UNSIGNED)\n")
cat("     Nominal × nominal\n")
cat("     Ranges 0–1; use contingency tables to recover direction\n\n")

cat("METHODOLOGICAL NOTE FOR THESIS:\n")
cat("  The matrix mixes constructed subscales/composites and single-item\n")
cat("  variables. Composite reliability is generally higher than single-item\n")
cat("  reliability, which attenuates composite–single-item correlations\n")
cat("  relative to composite–composite pairs. Acknowledge in table footnote.\n\n")

cat("REFERENCES:\n")
cat("  Cureton EE (1956). Rank-biserial correlation. Psychometrika, 21, 287-290.\n")
cat("  Cohen J (1988). Statistical Power Analysis (2nd ed.). Erlbaum.\n")
cat("  Richardson JTE (2011). Eta squared. Practical Assessment, 16(6).\n\n")

cat("✓ Ready for Chunk 17\n\n")
```
